27026.title: Can the Unemployed Borrow? Implications for Public Insurance
27026.zh_title: 失业者能借贷吗？对公共保险的启示
27026.authors: J. Carter Braxton, Kyle F. Herkenhoff, Gordon M. Phillips
27026.abstract: We show that unemployed individuals maintain significant access to credit. Following job loss, the unconstrained borrow, while the constrained default and delever. Both defaulters and borrowers are using credit to smooth consumption. We quantitatively show that long-term credit relationships and credit-registries allow the unemployed to partially offset income losses using credit. We estimate the model and find that the optimal provision of public insurance is unambiguously lower with greater credit access. Using a utilitarian welfare criterion, the optimal steady-state policy is to lower the replacement rate of public insurance from the current US policy of 41.2% to 38.3%. Moreover, lowering the replacement rate to 38.3% yields welfare gains to the majority of workers along the transition path.
27026.zh_abstract: 我们表明，失业者仍然保持着显著的信贷获取渠道。在失业后，不受约束者会借贷，而受约束者则会违约并去杠杆化。违约者和借贷者都在利用信贷来平滑消费。我们定量地表明，长期信贷关系和信用登记机构允许失业者利用信贷部分抵消收入损失。我们估计了模型，发现随着信贷获取渠道的增加，公共保险的最优提供水平明确降低。使用功利主义福利标准，最优稳态政策是将公共保险的替代率从当前美国政策的41.2%降低到38.3%。此外，将替代率降低到38.3%会在转型路径上为大多数工人带来福利收益。
27026.meta: Programs：CF, IFM, ME, POL；JEL：D14, E21, E24, G51, J64

27025.title: Portfolio Choice with Sustainable Spending: A Model of Reaching for Yield
27025.zh_title: 可持续支出下的投资组合选择：一个追逐收益的模型
27025.abstract: We show that reaching for yield -- a tendency to take more risk when the real interest rate declines while the risk premium remains constant -- results from imposing a sustainable spending constraint on an otherwise standard infinitely lived investor with power utility. When the interest rate is initially low, reaching for yield intensifies. The sustainable spending constraint also affects the response of risktaking to a change in the risk premium, which can even change sign. In a variant of the model where the sustainable spending constraint is formulated in nominal terms, low inflation also encourages risktaking.
27025.zh_abstract: 我们表明，追逐收益——即在实际利率下降而风险溢价保持不变时倾向于承担更多风险——源于对一个原本标准的、具有幂效用函数的无限期投资者施加可持续支出约束。当利率最初较低时，追逐收益会加剧。可持续支出约束也会影响风险承担对风险溢价变化的反应，这种反应甚至可能改变符号。在可持续支出约束以名义形式表述的模型变体中，低通胀也会鼓励风险承担。

27024.title: On Vickrey’s Income Averaging
27024.zh_title: 论维克里的收入平均化
27024.abstract: We consider a small set of axioms for income averaging – recursivity, continuity, and the boundary condition for the present. These properties yield a unique averaging function that is the density of the reflected Brownian motion with a drift started at the current income and moving over the past incomes. When averaging is done over the short past, the weighting function is asymptotically converging to a Gaussian. When averaging is done over the long horizon, the weighing function converges to the exponential distribution. For all intermediate averaging scales, we derive an explicit solution that interpolates between the two.
27024.zh_abstract: 我们考虑了一组关于收入平均化的小型公理——递归性、连续性以及当前的边界条件。这些性质产生了一个唯一的平均化函数，该函数是带漂移的反射布朗运动的密度，从当前收入开始并回溯过去收入。当平均化在短期过去进行时，权重函数渐近收敛于高斯分布。当平均化在长期范围内进行时，权重函数收敛于指数分布。对于所有中间平均化尺度，我们推导出一个在两者之间插值的显式解。

27023.title: Estimating the COVID-19 Infection Rate: Anatomy of an Inference Problem
27023.zh_title: 估计COVID-19感染率：一个推断问题的剖析
27023.abstract: As a consequence of missing data on tests for infection and imperfect accuracy of tests, reported rates of population infection by the SARS CoV-2 virus are lower than actual rates of infection. Hence, reported rates of severe illness conditional on infection are higher than actual rates. Understanding the time path of the COVID-19 pandemic has been hampered by the absence of bounds on infection rates that are credible and informative. This paper explains the logical problem of bounding these rates and reports illustrative findings, using data from Illinois, New York, and Italy. We combine the data with assumptions on the infection rate in the untested population and on the accuracy of the tests that appear credible in the current context. We find that the infection rate might be substantially higher than reported. We also find that the infection fatality rate in Italy is substantially lower than reported.
27023.zh_abstract: 由于感染检测数据缺失以及检测准确度不完美，报告的SARS CoV-2病毒人群感染率低于实际感染率。因此，报告的条件于感染的严重疾病发生率高于实际发生率。理解COVID-19大流行的时间路径一直受到缺乏可信且信息丰富的感染率界限的阻碍。本文解释了界定这些比率的逻辑问题，并报告了使用伊利诺伊州、纽约州和意大利数据的说明性发现。我们将数据与关于未检测人群感染率以及检测准确度的假设相结合，这些假设在当前背景下似乎是可信的。我们发现感染率可能远高于报告值。我们还发现意大利的感染致死率远低于报告值。

27022.title: The US Equity Valuation Premium, Globalization, and Climate Change Risks
27022.zh_title: 美国股权估值溢价、全球化与气候变化风险
27022.authors: Craig Doidge, G. Andrew Karolyi, René M. Stulz
27022.abstract: In the 2000s, US firms have higher valuations than comparable non-US firms listed only outside the US but not non-US firms cross-listed in the US. Though one would expect this US valuation premium to fall over time because of globalization, it widens for firms in developed markets by 36% and falls for firms in emerging markets by 20% after the global financial crisis of 2007-2008. This evolution is explained in part by the decreased valuation of brown firms in other developed countries relative to the US. Other potential explanations are explored and rejected.
27022.zh_abstract: 在2000年代，美国公司的估值高于仅在境外上市的可比非美国公司，但不高于在美国交叉上市的非美国公司。尽管由于全球化，人们预期这一美国估值溢价会随时间下降，但在2007-2008年全球金融危机后，发达市场公司的溢价扩大了36%，而新兴市场公司的溢价下降了20%。这种演变部分可由其他发达国家相对于美国的棕色公司估值下降来解释。其他可能的解释已被探讨并排除。
27022.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：F21, F65, G10, G15, G34

27021.title: The Subways Seeded the Massive Coronavirus Epidemic in New York City
27021.zh_title: 地铁播下了纽约市大规模冠状病毒疫情的种子
27021.abstract: New York City’s multipronged subway system was a major disseminator – if not the principal transmission vehicle – of coronavirus infection during the initial takeoff of the massive epidemic that became evident throughout the city during March 2020. The near shutoff of subway ridership in Manhattan – down by over 90 percent at the end of March – correlates strongly with the substantial increase in the doubling time of new cases in this borough. Subway lines with the largest drop in ridership during the second and third weeks of March had the lowest subsequent rates of infection in the zip codes traversed by their routes. Maps of subway station turnstile entries, superimposed upon zip code-level maps of reported coronavirus incidence, are strongly consistent with subway-facilitated disease propagation. Reciprocal seeding of infection appears to be the best explanation for the emergence of a single hotspot in Midtown West in Manhattan.
27021.zh_abstract: 纽约市的多管齐下地铁系统是2020年3月全市范围内显现的大规模疫情初期爆发期间冠状病毒感染的主要传播者——如果不是主要传播媒介的话。曼哈顿地铁乘客量近乎关闭——3月底下降超过90%——与该行政区新增病例倍增时间的大幅增加密切相关。在3月第二和第三周乘客量下降最大的地铁线路，其路线经过的邮政编码区域后续感染率最低。地铁站闸机入口地图叠加在报告的冠状病毒发病率邮政编码级别地图上，与地铁促进疾病传播的结论高度一致。感染的相互播撒似乎是解释曼哈顿中城西部单一热点出现的最佳解释。

27020.title: Economic Policy Incentives to Preserve Lives and Livelihoods
27020.zh_title: 保护生命与生计的经济政策激励
27020.abstract: The Covid-19 pandemic has motivated a myriad of studies and proposals on how economic policy should respond to this colossal shock. But in this debate it is seldom recognized that the health shock is not entirely exogenous. Its magnitude and dynamics themselves depend on economic policies, and the explicit or implicit incentives those policies provide. To illuminate the feedback loops between medical and economic factors we develop a minimal economic model of pandemics. In the model, as in reality, individual decisions to comply (or not) with virus-related public health directives depend on economic variables and incentives, which themselves respond to current economic policy and expectations of future policies. The analysis yields several practical lessons: because policies affect the speed of virus transmission via incentives, public health measures and economic policies can complement each other, reducing the cost of attaining desired social goals; expectations of expansionary macroeconomic policies during the recovery phase can help reduce the speed of infection, and hence the size of the health shock; the credibility of announced policies is key to rule out both self-fulfilling pessimistic expectations and time inconsistency problems. The analysis also yields a critique of the current use of SIR models for policy evaluation, in the spirit of Lucas (1983).
27020.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情催生了大量关于经济政策应如何应对这一巨大冲击的研究与建议。但在这场辩论中，很少有人认识到健康冲击并非完全外生。其规模与动态本身取决于经济政策，以及这些政策所提供的显性或隐性激励。为了阐明医疗因素与经济因素之间的反馈循环，我们构建了一个简约的流行病经济模型。在该模型中，如同现实一样，个人遵守（或不遵守）与病毒相关的公共卫生指令的决定取决于经济变量和激励，而这些变量和激励本身又受到当前经济政策及对未来政策预期的影响。分析得出了若干实践启示：由于政策通过激励影响病毒传播速度，公共卫生措施与经济政策可以相互补充，从而降低实现预期社会目标的成本；对复苏阶段扩张性宏观经济政策的预期有助于降低感染速度，进而减小健康冲击的规模；已宣布政策的可信度对于排除自我实现的悲观预期和时间不一致性问题至关重要。分析还基于卢卡斯（1983）的精神，对当前使用SIR模型进行政策评估的做法提出了批评。

27019.title: Covid-19: Testing Inequality in New York City
27019.zh_title: 新冠疫情：纽约市检测中的不平等
27019.authors: Stephanie Schmitt-Grohé, Ken Teoh, Martín Uribe
27019.abstract: Motivated by reports in the media suggesting unequal access to Covid-19 testing across incomes, we analyze zip-code level data on the number of Covid-19 tests, test results, and income per capita in New York City. We find that the number of tests administered is evenly distributed across income levels. In particular, the test distribution across income levels is significantly more egalitarian than the distribution of income itself: The ten percent of the city's population living in the richest zip codes received 11 percent of the Covid-19 tests and 29 percent of the city's income. The ten percent of the city's population living in the poorest zip codes received 10 percent of the tests but only 4 percent of the city's income. At the same time, we find significant disparity in the fraction of tests that come back negative for the Covid-19 disease across income levels: moving from the poorest zip codes to the richest zip codes is associated with an increase in the fraction of negative Covid-19 test results from 38 to 65 percent.
27019.zh_abstract: 受媒体报道中关于不同收入群体获得新冠检测机会不均等的启发，我们分析了纽约市按邮政编码划分的新冠检测数量、检测结果以及人均收入数据。我们发现，检测数量在不同收入水平之间分布均匀。特别是，检测在不同收入水平之间的分布比收入本身的分布要平等得多：居住在收入最高邮政编码区的城市人口占10%，他们接受了11%的新冠检测，却获得了城市29%的收入；居住在收入最低邮政编码区的城市人口占10%，他们接受了10%的检测，但仅获得城市4%的收入。与此同时，我们发现不同收入水平之间新冠检测阴性结果的比例存在显著差异：从最贫困的邮政编码区到最富裕的邮政编码区，新冠检测阴性结果的比例从38%上升到65%。

27018.title: Lock-downs, Loneliness and Life Satisfaction
27018.zh_title: 封锁、孤独感与生活满意度
27018.abstract: Using the 2012-13 American Time Use Survey, I find that both who people spend time with and how they spend it affect their happiness, adjusted for numerous demographic and economic variables. Satisfaction among married individuals increases most with additional time spent with spouse. Among singles, satisfaction decreases most as more time is spent alone. Assuming that lock-downs constrain married people to spend time solely with their spouses, simulations show that their happiness may have been increased compared to before the lock-downs; but sufficiently large losses of work time and income reverse this inference. Simulations demonstrate clearly that, assuming lock-downs impose solitude on singles, their happiness was reduced, reductions that are made more severe by income and work losses.
27018.zh_abstract: 利用2012-2013年美国时间使用调查数据，我发现，在调整了众多人口统计和经济变量后，人们与谁共度时光以及如何度过时光都会影响他们的幸福感。已婚人士的满意度随着与配偶共度额外时间的增加而提升最多。在单身人士中，随着独处时间的增加，满意度下降最多。假设封锁迫使已婚人士只能与配偶共度时光，模拟显示，与封锁前相比，他们的幸福感可能有所提升；但工作时间和收入的足够大损失会逆转这一推论。模拟清楚地表明，假设封锁迫使单身人士独处，他们的幸福感会降低，而收入和工作的损失会使这种降低更加严重。

27017.title: Labor Markets During the COVID-19 Crisis: A Preliminary View
27017.zh_title: 新冠疫情危机期间的劳动力市场：初步观察
27017.authors: Olivier Coibion, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Michael Weber
27017.abstract: We use a repeated large-scale survey of households in the Nielsen Homescan panel to characterize how labor markets are being affected by the covid-19 pandemic. We document several facts. First, job loss has been significantly larger than implied by new unemployment claims: we estimate 20 million lost jobs by April 6th, far more than jobs lost over the entire Great Recession. Second, many of those losing jobs are not actively looking to find new ones. As a result, we estimate the rise in the unemployment rate over the corresponding period to be surprisingly small, only about 2 percentage points. Third, participation in the labor force has declined by 7 percentage points, an unparalleled fall that dwarfs the three percentage point cumulative decline that occurred from 2008 to 2016.
27017.zh_abstract: 我们利用尼尔森家庭扫描面板中重复进行的大规模家庭调查，来描述劳动力市场如何受到新冠疫情的影响。我们记录了若干事实。首先，失业规模远大于新增失业救济申请所暗示的数字：我们估计截至4月6日已有2000万个工作岗位流失，远超大衰退期间失去的工作岗位总数。其次，许多失业者并未积极寻找新工作。因此，我们估计同期失业率的上升幅度出奇地小，仅约2个百分点。第三，劳动力参与率下降了7个百分点，这是一次无与伦比的下降，使2008年至2016年累计下降的3个百分点相形见绌。
27017.meta: Programs：AG, AP, CF, EFG, LS, ME；JEL：C83, D84, E31, J21, J26

27016.title: Market Structure and Product Assortment: Evidence from a Natural Experiment in Liquor Licensure
27016.zh_title: 市场结构与产品组合：来自酒类许可证自然实验的证据
27016.abstract: We examine how market structure, measured as the number of firms, affects prices, quantities, product assortment, and consumer surplus. Our analysis exploits Washington’s deregulation of spirit sales, which generated exogenous variation in market structure across the state. Consistent with the uniform pricing literature, we find no effect of increased competition on prices. Rather, we document an expansion of product assortment, which in turn increases purchasing. Using a discrete-choice demand model, we estimate that wider assortments increase consumer surplus by $\$3.20$/month when moving from monopoly to duopoly. However, the likelihood that a household engages in heavy drinking, as defined by the CDC, increases by 5.6 percentage points, raising concerns about social welfare.
27016.zh_abstract: 我们研究了市场结构（以企业数量衡量）如何影响价格、数量、产品组合和消费者剩余。我们的分析利用了华盛顿州对烈酒销售放松管制这一事件，该事件在全州范围内产生了市场结构的外生变化。与统一定价文献一致，我们发现竞争加剧对价格没有影响。相反，我们记录了产品组合的扩张，这反过来又增加了购买量。利用离散选择需求模型，我们估计，从垄断转向双头垄断时，更广泛的产品组合使消费者剩余每月增加3.20美元。然而，根据美国疾病控制与预防中心的定义，家庭参与重度饮酒的可能性增加了5.6个百分点，这引发了关于社会福利的担忧。

27015.title: Innovative Growth Accounting
27015.abstract: Recent work highlights a falling entry rate of new firms and a rising market share of large firms in the United States. To understand how these changing firm demographics have affected growth, we decompose productivity growth into the firms doing the innovating. We trace how much each firm innovates by the rate at which it opens and closes plants, the market share of those plants, and how fast its surviving plants grow. Using data on all nonfarm businesses from 1982–2013, we find that new and young firms (ages 0 to 5 years) account for almost one-half of growth – three times their share of employment. Large established firms contribute only one-tenth of growth despite representing one-fourth of employment. Older firms do explain most of the speedup and slowdown during the middle of our sample. Finally, most growth takes the form of incumbents improving their own products, as opposed to creative destruction or new varieties.
27015.zh_abstract: 近期研究突显了美国新企业进入率下降和大型企业市场份额上升的趋势。为了理解这些变化的企业人口结构如何影响增长，我们将生产率增长分解到进行创新的企业层面。我们通过企业开设和关闭工厂的速率、这些工厂的市场份额以及其存活工厂的增长速度来追踪每家企业的创新程度。利用1982年至2013年所有非农企业的数据，我们发现新企业和年轻企业（成立0至5年）几乎占增长的一半——是其就业份额的三倍。大型成熟企业仅贡献了增长的十分之一，尽管它们占就业的四分之一。年长企业确实解释了样本中期大部分的增长加速和减速。最后，大多数增长表现为在位企业改进自身产品，而非创造性破坏或新品种。

27014.title: Advances in Using Vector Autoregressions to Estimate Structural Magnitudes
27014.zh_title: 利用向量自回归估计结构性参数的最新进展
27014.abstract: This paper surveys recent advances in drawing structural conclusions from vector autoregressions, providing a unified perspective on the role of prior knowledge. We describe the traditional approach to identification as a claim to have exact prior information about the structural model and propose Bayesian inference as a way to acknowledge that prior information is imperfect or subject to error. We raise concerns from both a frequentist and a Bayesian perspective about the way that results are typically reported for VARs that are set-identified using sign and other restrictions. We call attention to a common but previously unrecognized error in estimating structural elasticities and show how to correctly estimate elasticities even in the case when one only knows the effects of a single structural shock.
27014.zh_abstract: 本文综述了从向量自回归中得出结构性结论的最新进展，并提供了关于先验知识作用的统一视角。我们将传统的识别方法描述为声称拥有关于结构模型的精确先验信息，并提出贝叶斯推断作为一种承认先验信息不完美或存在误差的方式。我们从频率学派和贝叶斯学派的角度，对通常使用符号约束和其他约束进行集合识别的VAR模型的结果报告方式提出了担忧。我们指出了在估计结构性弹性时一个常见但此前未被认识到的错误，并展示了即使在只知道单一结构性冲击效应的情况下，如何正确估计弹性。

27013.title: An Alternative Explanation for the “Fed Information Effect”
27013.zh_title: 对“美联储信息效应”的另一种解释
27013.authors: Michael D. Bauer, Eric T. Swanson
27013.abstract: High-frequency changes in interest rates around FOMC announcements are a standard method of measuring monetary policy shocks. However, some recent studies have documented puzzling effects of these shocks on private-sector forecasts of GDP, unemployment, or inflation that are opposite in sign to what standard macroeconomic models would predict. This evidence has been viewed as supportive of a “Fed information effect” channel of monetary policy, whereby an FOMC tightening (easing) communicates that the economy is stronger (weaker) than the public had expected. We show that these empirical results are also consistent with a “Fed response to news” channel, in which incoming, publicly available economic news causes both the Fed to change monetary policy and the private sector to revise its forecasts. We provide substantial new evidence that distinguishes between these two channels and strongly favors the latter; for example, (i) regressions that include the previously omitted public economic news, (ii) a new survey that we conduct of Blue Chip forecasters, and (iii) high-frequency financial market responses to FOMC announcements all indicate that the Fed and private sector are simply responding to the same public news, and that there is little if any role for a “Fed information effect”.
27013.zh_abstract: 联邦公开市场委员会公告前后利率的高频变化是衡量货币政策冲击的标准方法。然而，近期一些研究记录了这些冲击对私营部门关于GDP、失业率或通胀预测的令人费解的影响，其符号与标准宏观经济模型的预测相反。这一证据被视为支持货币政策“美联储信息效应”渠道，即联邦公开市场委员会收紧（放松）政策传递出经济比公众预期更强劲（更疲弱）的信号。我们表明，这些实证结果也与“美联储对新闻的反应”渠道一致，在该渠道中，新发布的公开经济新闻既导致美联储改变货币政策，也导致私营部门修正其预测。我们提供了大量新证据来区分这两个渠道，并强烈支持后者；例如：（i）包含先前遗漏的公共经济新闻的回归分析，（ii）我们对蓝筹股预测者进行的一项新调查，以及（iii）联邦公开市场委员会公告的高频金融市场反应，均表明美联储和私营部门只是对相同的公共新闻做出反应，而“美联储信息效应”几乎没有发挥任何作用。

27012.title: Disputes in International Investment and Trade
27012.authors: Ralph Ossa, Robert W. Staiger, Alan O. Sykes
27012.abstract: International investment agreements employ dispute settlement procedures that differ markedly from their counterparts in trade agreements along three key dimensions: standing (i.e., the right to file grievances), the nature of the remedy, and the remedial period. In the state-to-state dispute settlement procedures of a typical trade agreement, only governments have standing, while private investors also have standing in the investor-state dispute settlement procedures employed by investment agreements. Trade agreements typically employ tariff retaliation as the remedy for violation of the agreement, while the award of cash damages is the norm in investment disputes. And trade agreements typically provide for only prospective remedies covering harm done subsequent to a ruling, while the damages awarded in investment disputes routinely cover past as well as future harms. We develop parallel models of trade agreements and investment agreements and employ them to study these differences. We argue that the differences can be understood as arising from the fundamentally different problems that trade and investment agreements are designed to solve.
27012.zh_abstract: 国际投资协定采用的争端解决程序与贸易协定中的对应程序在三个关键维度上存在显著差异：诉讼资格（即提出申诉的权利）、救济的性质以及救济期限。在典型贸易协定的国家间争端解决程序中，只有政府拥有诉讼资格，而投资协定采用的投资者与国家间争端解决程序则赋予私人投资者诉讼资格。贸易协定通常采用关税报复作为违反协定的救济措施，而现金损害赔偿则是投资争端中的常规做法。此外，贸易协定通常仅提供预期救济，涵盖裁决后造成的损害，而投资争端中裁定的损害赔偿通常涵盖过去和未来的损害。我们构建了贸易协定和投资协定的平行模型，并利用它们来研究这些差异。我们认为，这些差异可以理解为源于贸易和投资协定旨在解决的根本不同问题。

27011.title: The Roots of Agricultural Innovation: Patent Evidence of Knowledge Spillovers
27011.zh_title: 农业创新的根源：知识溢出的专利证据
27011.authors: Matthew S. Clancy, Paul Heisey, Yongjie Ji, GianCarlo Moschini
27011.abstract: This chapter investigates the extent to which agricultural innovations draw on ideas originating outside of agriculture. We identify a large set of US patents for agricultural technologies granted between 1976 and 2018. To measure knowledge spillovers to these patents, we rely on three proxies: patent citations to other patents, patent citations to the scientific literature, and a novel text analysis to identify and track new ideas in the patent text. We find that more than half of knowledge flows originate outside of agriculture. The majority of these knowledge inflows, however, still originate in domains that are close to agriculture.
27011.zh_abstract: 本章研究了农业创新在多大程度上借鉴了农业领域之外的思想。我们识别了1976年至2018年间授予的大量美国农业技术专利。为了衡量这些专利的知识溢出，我们依赖三个代理指标：专利对其他专利的引用、专利对科学文献的引用，以及一种新颖的文本分析方法，用于识别和追踪专利文本中的新思想。我们发现，超过一半的知识流动源自农业领域之外。然而，这些知识流入的大部分仍然源于与农业相近的领域。

27010.title: Spending Less After (Seemingly) Bad News
27010.zh_title: 在（看似）坏消息后减少支出
27010.authors: Mark Garmaise, Yaron Levi, Hanno Lustig
27010.abstract: Using high-frequency spending data, we show that household consumption displays excess sensitivity to salient macro-economic news, even when the news is not real. When the announced local unemployment rate reaches a 12-month maximum, local news coverage of unemployment increases and local consumers reduce their discretionary spending by 2% relative to consumers in areas with the same macro-economic fundamentals. The consumption of low-income households displays greater excess sensitivity to salience. The decrease in spending is not reversed in subsequent months; instead, negative news persistently reduces future spending for two to four months. Households in treated areas act as if they are more financially constrained than those in untreated areas with the same fundamentals.
27010.zh_abstract: 利用高频支出数据，我们表明家庭消费对显著的宏观经济新闻表现出过度敏感性，即使这些新闻并非真实。当公布的当地失业率达到12个月最高点时，当地对失业的新闻报道增加，当地消费者的可自由支配支出相对于具有相同宏观经济基本面的地区的消费者减少了2%。低收入家庭的消费对显著性表现出更大的过度敏感性。支出的减少在随后的月份中并未逆转；相反，负面新闻持续性地减少未来两到四个月的支出。处理组地区的家庭表现得比具有相同基本面的未处理组地区的家庭更受财务约束。

27009.title: Covid-19 Infection Externalities: Trading Off Lives vs. Livelihoods
27009.zh_title: COVID-19感染外部性：生命与生计的权衡
27009.abstract: We analyze the externalities that arise when social and economic interactions transmit infectious diseases such as COVID-19. Individually rational agents do not internalize that they impose infection externalities upon others when the disease is transmitted. In an SIR model calibrated to capture the main features of COVID-19 in the US economy, we show that private agents perceive the cost an additional infection to be around $\$80$k whereas the social cost including infection externalities is more than three times higher, around $\$286$k. This misvaluation has stark implications for how society ultimately overcomes the disease: for a population of individually rational agents, the precautionary behavior by the susceptible flattens the curve of infections, but the disease is not overcome until herd immunity is acquired. The resulting economic cost is high; an initial sharp decline in aggregate output followed by a slow recovery over several years. By contrast, the socially optimal approach in our model focuses public policy measures on the infected in order to contain the disease and quickly eradicate it, which produces a much milder recession. If targeting the infected is impossible, the optimal policy in our model is still to aggressively contain and eliminate the disease, and the social cost of an extra infection rises to $\$586$k.
27009.zh_abstract: 我们分析了当社会和经济互动传播传染病（如COVID-19）时产生的外部性。当疾病传播时，个体理性代理人没有内化他们强加给其他人的感染外部性。在一个校准以捕捉美国经济中COVID-19主要特征的SIR模型中，我们表明私人代理人认为额外感染的成本约为8万美元，而包括感染外部性在内的社会成本则高出三倍多，约为28.6万美元。这种错误估值对社会最终如何战胜疾病具有显著影响：对于个体理性代理人群体，易感者的预防行为使感染曲线趋平，但疾病直到获得群体免疫才被克服。由此产生的经济成本很高；总产出最初急剧下降，随后是持续数年的缓慢复苏。相比之下，我们模型中的社会最优方法将公共政策措施集中于感染者，以控制疾病并迅速根除它，这会产生温和得多的衰退。如果无法针对感染者，我们模型中的最优政策仍然是积极控制和消除疾病，此时额外感染的社会成本上升至58.6万美元。
27009.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, EH, IFM, PE；JEL：E1, E65, H12, H23, I18

27008.title: Risk Perception Through the Lens of Politics in the Time of the COVID-19 Pandemic
27008.zh_title: COVID-19大流行时期通过政治视角的风险感知
27008.abstract: Even when, objectively speaking, death is on the line, partisan bias still colors beliefs about facts. We show that a higher share of Trump voters in a county is associated with lower perceptions of risk during the COVID-19 pandemic. As Trump voter share rises, individuals search less for information on the virus, and engage in less social distancing behavior, as measured by smartphone location patterns. These patterns persist in the face of state-level mandates to close schools and businesses or to “stay home,” and reverse only when conservative politicians are exposed and the White House releases federal social distancing guidelines.
27008.zh_abstract: 即使客观上说，死亡迫在眉睫，党派偏见仍然会影响对事实的信念。我们表明，一个县中特朗普选民比例越高，在COVID-19大流行期间对风险的感知就越低。随着特朗普选民比例上升，个人搜索病毒信息的次数减少，并且根据智能手机定位模式衡量，参与社交疏离行为的程度也降低。这些模式在州级关闭学校和企业或“居家令”的强制要求下依然存在，并且只有在保守派政治家被曝光以及白宫发布联邦社交疏离指南后才发生逆转。

27007.title: Policy Implications of Models of the Spread of Coronavirus: Perspectives and Opportunities for Economists
27007.zh_title: 冠状病毒传播模型的政策含义：经济学家的视角与机遇
27007.authors: Christopher Avery, William Bossert, Adam Clark, Glenn Ellison, Sara Fisher Ellison
27007.abstract: This paper provides a critical review of models of the spread of the coronavirus (SARS-CoV-2) epidemic that have been influential in recent policy decisions. There is tremendous opportunity for social scientists to advance the relevant literature as new and better data becomes available to bolster economic outcomes and save lives.
27007.zh_abstract: 本文对近期影响政策决策的冠状病毒（SARS-CoV-2）流行病传播模型进行了批判性评述。随着新的、更好的数据变得可用，以加强经济成果并拯救生命，社会科学家有巨大的机会来推进相关文献。

27006.title: No Line Left Behind: Assortative Matching Inside the Firm
27006.zh_title: 不让任何生产线掉队：公司内部的分类匹配
27006.authors: Achyuta Adhvaryu, Vittorio Bassi, Anant Nyshadham, Jorge A. Tamayo
27006.abstract: How do firms pair workers with managers, and which constraints affect the allocation of labor within the firm? We characterize the sorting pattern of managers to workers in a large readymade garment manufacturer in India, and then explore potential drivers of the observed allocation. Workers in this firm are organized into production lines, each supervised by a manager. We exploit the high degree of worker mobility across lines, together with worker-level productivity data, to estimate the sorting of workers to managers. We find negative assortative matching (NAM) -that is, better managers tend to match with worse workers, and vice versa. This stands in contrast to our estimates of the production technology, which reveal that if the firm were to positively sort, productivity would increase by 1 to 4 percent across the six factories in our data. Coupling these findings with a survey of managers and with data on multinational brands and the orders they place, we document that NAM arises, at least in part, because the value of buyer relationships imposes minimum productivity constraints on each production line. Our results emphasize that suppliers to the global market, when they are beholden to a small set of powerful buyers, may be driven to allocate managerial skill to service these relationships, even at the expense of productivity.
27006.zh_abstract: 企业如何将工人与管理者配对，以及哪些约束影响了公司内部的劳动力配置？我们描述了印度一家大型成衣制造商中管理者与工人的分类匹配模式，然后探讨了观察到的配置的潜在驱动因素。这家公司的工人被组织成生产线，每条生产线由一名管理者监督。我们利用工人跨生产线的高度流动性，以及工人层面的生产率数据，来估计工人与管理者之间的匹配。我们发现负向分类匹配——即更好的管理者倾向于与更差的工人匹配，反之亦然。这与我们对生产技术的估计形成对比，后者揭示，如果公司进行正向分类，我们数据中六个工厂的生产率将提高1%到4%。将这些发现与对管理者的调查以及跨国品牌及其订单数据相结合，我们记录了负向分类匹配的产生，至少部分是因为买方关系的价值对每条生产线施加了最低生产率约束。我们的结果强调，全球市场的供应商，当他们受制于一小部分强大的买方时，可能会被迫分配管理技能来服务于这些关系，即使以牺牲生产率为代价。

27005.title: Countervailing Market Power and Hospital Competition
27005.zh_title: 抵消市场力量与医院竞争
27005.authors: Eric Barrette, Gautam Gowrisankaran, Robert Town
27005.abstract: While economic theories indicate that market power by downstream ﬁrms can potentially counteract market power upstream, antitrust policy is opaque about whether to incorporate countervailing market power in merger analyses. We use detailed national claims data from the healthcare sector to evaluate whether countervailing insurer power does indeed limit hospitals’ exercise of market power. We estimate willingness-to-pay models to evaluate hospital market power across analysis areas. We ﬁnd that countervailing market power is important: a typical hospital merger would raise hospital prices 4.3% at the 25th percentile of insurer concentration but only 0.97% at the 75th percentile of insurer concentration.
27005.zh_abstract: 虽然经济理论表明下游企业的市场力量可能潜在地抵消上游的市场力量，但反垄断政策对于是否在合并分析中纳入抵消市场力量并不明确。我们利用来自医疗保健部门的详细国家索赔数据来评估抵消的保险公司力量是否确实限制了医院行使市场力量。我们估计了支付意愿模型，以评估跨分析区域的医院市场力量。我们发现抵消市场力量很重要：在保险公司集中度的第25百分位，一次典型的医院合并将使医院价格提高4.3%，但在保险公司集中度的第75百分位，仅提高0.97%。

27004.title: Shotgun Wedding: Fiscal and Monetary Policy
27004.zh_title: 强制联姻：财政与货币政策
27004.abstract: This paper describes interactions between monetary and fiscal policies that affect equilibrium price levels and interest rates by critically surveying theories about (a) optimal anticipated inflation, (b) optimal unanticipated inflation, and (c) conditions that secure a "nominal anchor'' in the sense of a unique price level path. We contrast incomplete theories whose inputs are budget-feasible sequences of government issued bonds and money with complete theories whose inputs are bond-money strategies described as sequences of functions that map time t histories into time t government actions. We cite historical episodes that confirm the theoretical insight that lines of authority between a Treasury and a Central Bank can be ambiguous, obscure, and fragile.
27004.zh_abstract: 本文通过批判性评述关于（a）最优预期通胀、（b）最优非预期通胀以及（c）确保“名义锚”（即唯一价格水平路径）的条件等理论，描述了影响均衡价格水平和利率的货币与财政政策之间的相互作用。我们将输入为政府发行的债券和货币的预算可行序列的不完整理论，与输入为债券-货币策略（描述为将时间t历史映射到时间t政府行动的函数序列）的完整理论进行了对比。我们引用了历史事件，证实了以下理论洞见：财政部与中央银行之间的权力界限可能模糊、不明确且脆弱。
27004.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E52, E61, E62, E63

27003.title: What’s up with the Phillips Curve?
27003.authors: Marco Del Negro, Michele Lenza, Giorgio E. Primiceri, Andrea Tambalotti
27003.abstract: The business cycle is alive and well, and real variables respond to it more or less as they always did. Witness the Great Recession. Inflation, in contrast, has gone quiescent. This paper studies the sources of this disconnect using VARs and an estimated DSGE model. It finds that the disconnect is due primarily to the muted reaction of inflation to cost pressures, regardless of how they are measured—a flat aggregate supply curve. A shift in policy towards more forceful inflation stabilization also appears to have played some role by reducing the impact of demand shocks on the real economy. The evidence rules out stories centered around changes in the structure of the labor market or in how we should measure its tightness.
27003.zh_abstract: 商业周期依然活跃，实际变量对其的反应或多或少与以往相同。大衰退就是明证。相比之下，通胀已趋于平静。本文利用VAR模型和估计的DSGE模型研究这种脱节的根源。研究发现，这种脱节主要源于通胀对成本压力的反应迟钝，无论成本压力如何衡量——即总供给曲线平坦。政策转向更积极的通胀稳定似乎也起到了一定作用，因为它减少了需求冲击对实体经济的影响。证据排除了围绕劳动力市场结构变化或我们应如何衡量其紧张程度的故事。

27002.title: Some Unpleasant Markup Arithmetic: Production Function Elasticities and their Estimation from Production Data
27002.zh_title: 一些令人不快的加成定价算术：生产函数弹性及其从生产数据中的估计
27002.authors: Steve Bond, Arshia Hashemi, Greg Kaplan, Piotr Zoch
27002.abstract: The ratio estimator of a firm's markup is the ratio of the output elasticity of a variable input to that input's cost share in revenue. This note raises issues that concern identification and estimation of markups using the ratio estimator. Concerning identification: (i) if the revenue elasticity is used in place of the output elasticity, then the estimand underlying the ratio estimator does not contain any information about the markup; (ii) if any part of the input bundle is either used to influence demand, or is neither fully fixed nor fully flexible, then the estimand underlying the ratio estimator is not equal to the markup. Concerning estimation: (i) even with data on output quantities, it is challenging to obtain consistent estimates of output elasticities when firms have market power; (ii) without data on output quantities, as is typically the case, it is not possible to obtain consistent estimates of output elasticities when firms have market power and markups are heterogeneous. These issues cast doubt over whether anything useful can be learned about heterogeneity or trends in markups, from recent attempts to apply the ratio estimator in settings without output quantity data.
27002.zh_abstract: 企业加成定价的比率估计量是可变投入的产出弹性与该投入在收入中的成本份额之比。本文提出了关于使用比率估计量识别和估计加成定价的问题。关于识别：（i）如果使用收入弹性代替产出弹性，那么比率估计量背后的估计目标不包含任何关于加成定价的信息；（ii）如果投入组合的任何部分要么用于影响需求，要么既非完全固定也非完全灵活，那么比率估计量背后的估计目标不等于加成定价。关于估计：（i）即使有产出数量数据，当企业拥有市场势力时，获得产出弹性的一致估计也具有挑战性；（ii）在没有产出数量数据的情况下（这是典型情况），当企业拥有市场势力且加成定价具有异质性时，不可能获得产出弹性的一致估计。这些问题使人们对近期在缺乏产出数量数据的情况下应用比率估计量能否了解加成定价的异质性或趋势产生了怀疑。
27002.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, PR；JEL：D2, D4, L1, L4

27001.title: Energy Markets and Global Economic Conditions
27001.zh_title: 能源市场与全球经济状况
27001.authors: Christiane Baumeister, Dimitris Korobilis, Thomas K. Lee
27001.abstract: This paper evaluates alternative indicators of global economic activity and other market fundamentals in terms of their usefulness for forecasting real oil prices and global petroleum consumption. We find that world industrial production is one of the most useful indicators that has been proposed in the literature. However, by combining measures from a number of different sources we can do even better. Our analysis results in a new index of global economic conditions and new measures for assessing future tightness of energy demand and expected oil price pressures.
27001.zh_abstract: 本文评估了不同的全球经济活动指标和其他市场基本面指标在预测实际石油价格和全球石油消费方面的有用性。我们发现，世界工业生产是文献中提出的最有用的指标之一。然而，通过结合来自多个不同来源的衡量指标，我们可以做得更好。我们的分析得出一个新的全球经济状况指数，以及用于评估未来能源需求紧张程度和预期油价压力的新衡量指标。
27001.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：C11, C32, C52, Q41, Q47

27000.title: Optimal Regulation of E-cigarettes: Theory and Evidence
27000.zh_title: 电子烟的最优监管：理论与证据
27000.abstract: There is an active debate about how to regulate electronic cigarettes, due to uncertainty about their health effects and whether they are primarily a quit aid or a gateway drug for combustible cigarettes. We model optimal e-cigarette regulation and estimate key parameters. Using tax changes and scanner data, we estimate relatively elastic demand. A demographic shift-share identification strategy suggests limited substitution between e-cigarettes and cigarettes. We field a new survey of public health experts, who report that vaping is more harmful than previously believed. In our model’s average Monte Carlo simulation, these results imply that optimal e-cigarette taxes are higher than recent norms. However, e-cigarette subsidies may be optimal if vaping is a stronger substitute for smoking and is safer than our experts report, or if consumers overestimate the health harms from vaping.
27000.zh_abstract: 关于如何监管电子烟存在激烈争论，原因在于其健康影响的不确定性，以及它主要是可燃香烟的戒烟辅助工具还是入门毒品。我们构建了最优电子烟监管模型并估计了关键参数。利用税收变化和扫描数据，我们估计出相对有弹性的需求。一种人口统计学的份额转移识别策略表明，电子烟和香烟之间的替代性有限。我们进行了一项新的公共卫生专家调查，他们报告称电子烟比之前认为的危害更大。在我们的模型平均蒙特卡洛模拟中，这些结果表明最优电子烟税率高于近期常态。然而，如果电子烟是吸烟的更强替代品且比我们的专家报告的安全，或者如果消费者高估了电子烟的健康危害，那么电子烟补贴可能是最优的。
27000.meta: Programs：EH, LE, PE；JEL：D12, D18, D61, H21, H23, I12, I18

27068.title: Asian American Discrimination in Harvard Admissions
27068.zh_title: 亚裔美国人在哈佛招生中受到的歧视
27068.authors: Peter Arcidiacono, Josh Kinsler, Tyler Ransom
27068.abstract: Detecting racial discrimination using observational data is challenging because of the presence of unobservables that may be correlated with race. Using data made public in the SFFA v. Harvard case, we estimate discrimination in a setting where this concern is mitigated. Namely, we show that there is a substantial penalty against Asian Americans in admissions with limited scope for omitted variables to overturn the result. This is because (i) Asian Americans are substantially stronger than whites on the observables associated with admissions and (ii) the richness of the data yields a model that predicts admissions extremely well. Our preferred model shows that Asian Americans would be admitted at a rate 19% higher absent this penalty. Controlling for one of the primary channels through which Asian American applicants are discriminated against--the personal rating--cuts the Asian American penalty by less than half, still leaving a substantial penalty.
27068.zh_abstract: 利用观察数据检测种族歧视具有挑战性，因为可能存在与种族相关的不可观测因素。我们利用SFFA诉哈佛案中公开的数据，在一个缓解了该问题的情境下估计歧视程度。具体而言，我们发现亚裔美国人在招生中受到显著的不利对待，且遗漏变量推翻这一结果的可能性有限。这是因为：(i) 在与招生相关的可观测指标上，亚裔美国人明显强于白人；(ii) 数据的丰富性使得模型对招生的预测能力极强。我们的首选模型显示，若无此不利对待，亚裔美国人的录取率将高出19%。控制亚裔申请人受歧视的主要渠道之一——个人评分——仅将亚裔的不利对待削减不到一半，仍留下显著的不利影响。
27068.meta: Programs：ED, LE, LS, PE；JEL：I23, I24, J15

27067.title: Original Sin and the Great Depression
27067.authors: Michael D. Bordo, Christopher M. Meissner
27067.abstract: Was foreign currency denominated debt a determinant of exchange rate and monetary policy during the Great Depression? Policy makers of the day thought so. High-frequency bond price data show depreciation was associated with elevated risk premia on public debt. We also show that foreign currency debt was a determinant of exchange rate policy during the Great Depression. The gold standard heightened exposure to global shocks and prolonged the Great Depression. Why then did countries hesitate to jettison the monetary technology? Multiple factors have been identified in the literature ranging from economic and political considerations to social preferences for monetary stability. We find that foreign currency debt and trade patterns, both shaped by history and geography, had a significant impact on these choices and hence on economic stability. The effect is likely to be about half as large as the output gap in determining exchange rate policy.
27067.zh_abstract: 外币计价债务是否是大萧条期间汇率和货币政策的一个决定因素？当时的政策制定者认为如此。高频债券价格数据显示，货币贬值与公共债务风险溢价上升相关。我们还表明，外币债务是大萧条期间汇率政策的一个决定因素。金本位制加剧了对全球冲击的暴露，并延长了大萧条。那么，各国为何迟迟不愿放弃这一货币技术？文献中已识别出多种因素，从经济和政治考量到对货币稳定的社会偏好。我们发现，由历史和地理共同塑造的外币债务和贸易模式对这些选择以及经济稳定性产生了显著影响。在决定汇率政策方面，其影响可能约为产出缺口的一半。
27067.meta: Programs：DAE, IFM, ME；JEL：F31, F34, N10, N2

27066.title: Mitigating Disaster Risks in the Age of Climate Change
27066.zh_title: 气候变化时代减轻灾害风险
27066.authors: Harrison Hong, Neng Wang, Jinqiang Yang
27066.abstract: Emissions abatement alone cannot address the consequences of global warming for weather disasters. We model how society adapts to manage disaster risks to capital stock. Optimal adaptation—a mix of form-level efforts and public spending—varies as society learns about the adverse consequences of global warming for disaster arrivals. Taxes on capital are needed alongside those on carbon to achieve the first best. We apply our model to country-level control of flooding from tropical cyclones. Learning rationalizes empirical findings, including the responses of Tobin's q, equity risk premium, and risk-free rate to disaster arrivals. Adaptation is more valuable under learning than a counterfactual no-learning environment. Learning alters social-cost-of-carbon projections due to the interaction of uncertainty resolution and endogenous adaptive response.
27066.zh_abstract: 仅靠减排无法应对全球变暖对天气灾害的后果。我们模拟了社会如何通过适应来管理资本存量的灾害风险。最优适应——一种企业层面努力与公共支出的组合——会随着社会对全球变暖导致灾害发生频率增加的不利后果的学习而发生变化。为实现最优结果，除了对碳征税外，还需要对资本征税。我们将模型应用于国家层面控制热带气旋引发的洪水。学习过程为实证发现提供了合理解释，包括托宾q、股权风险溢价和无风险利率对灾害发生的反应。在学习环境下，适应的价值高于反事实的无学习环境。由于不确定性解决与内生适应反应之间的相互作用，学习改变了碳的社会成本预测。
27066.meta: Programs：AP, EEE, EH, PE；JEL：E21, E22, E23, G12, G28, G52, H23, H41

27065.title: Should the U.S. Government Issue Floating Rate Notes?
27065.zh_title: 美国政府是否应发行浮动利率票据？
27065.abstract: Since January 2014 the U.S. Treasury has been issuing floating rate notes (FRNs). We estimate that the U.S. FRNs have been paying excess interest between 5 and 39 basis points above the implied cost for other Treasury securities. We find a strong positive relation between our estimated excess spreads on FRNs and the subsequent realized excess returns of FRNs over related T-bill investment strategies. With more than 300 billion dollars of FRNs outstanding, the yearly excess borrowing costs are estimated to be several hundreds of millions of dollars. To rationalize this finding, we examine the role of FRNs from the perspective of optimal government debt management to smooth taxes. In the model, bills can be cheaper to issue than FRNs, and the payoffs for FRNs are perfectly correlated with future short rates. FRNs can be used to manage the refinancing risk from rolling over short-term debt. We derive conditions under which the issuance of FRNs can optimally be positive.
27065.zh_abstract: 自2014年1月以来，美国财政部一直在发行浮动利率票据（FRN）。我们估计，美国FRN支付的超额利息比隐含的其他国债成本高出5至39个基点。我们发现，我们估计的FRN超额利差与随后FRN相对于相关国库券投资策略的超额实现收益之间存在强正相关关系。由于未偿FRN超过3000亿美元，估计每年的超额借贷成本达数亿美元。为解释这一发现，我们从最优政府债务管理以平滑税收的角度考察了FRN的作用。在模型中，国库券的发行成本可能低于FRN，且FRN的收益与未来短期利率完全相关。FRN可用于管理短期债务展期的再融资风险。我们推导了FRN发行量可以最优为正的条件。

27064.title: The Long and Short (Run) of Trade Elasticities
27064.zh_title: 贸易弹性的长期与短期
27064.authors: Christoph E. Boehm, Andrei A. Levchenko, Nitya Pandalai-Nayar
27064.abstract: We propose a novel approach to estimate the trade elasticity at various horizons. When countries change Most Favored Nation (MFN) tariffs, partners that trade on MFN terms experience plausibly exogenous tariff changes. The differential effects on imports from these countries relative to a control group – countries not subject to the MFN tariff scheme – can be used to identify the trade elasticity. We build a panel dataset combining information on product-level tariffs and trade flows covering 1995-2018, and estimate the trade elasticity at short and long horizons using local projections (Jordà, 2005). Our main findings are that the elasticity of tariff-exclusive trade flows in the year following the exogenous tariff change is about −0.76, and the long-run elasticity ranges from −1.75 to −2.25. Our long-run estimates are smaller than typical in the literature, and it takes 7-10 years to converge to the long run, implying that (i) the welfare gains from trade are high and (ii) there are substantial convexities in the costs of adjusting export participation.
27064.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种新颖的方法来估计不同时间跨度的贸易弹性。当各国改变最惠国（MFN）关税时，以MFN条款进行贸易的伙伴国面临看似外生的关税变化。这些国家相对于对照组（不受MFN关税方案约束的国家）的进口差异效应可用于识别贸易弹性。我们构建了一个结合产品层面关税和贸易流信息的面板数据集，覆盖1995-2018年，并使用局部投影法（Jordà, 2005）估计短期和长期的贸易弹性。我们的主要发现是，在外生关税变化后的第一年，不含关税的贸易流弹性约为-0.76，长期弹性在-1.75至-2.25之间。我们的长期估计值小于文献中的典型值，且需要7-10年才能收敛到长期水平，这意味着：(i) 贸易福利收益较高，(ii) 调整出口参与的成本存在显著凸性。
27064.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI；JEL：F0, F1, F14, F4

27063.title: Sequential Lifting of COVID-19 Interventions with Population Heterogeneity
27063.zh_title: 考虑人口异质性的COVID-19干预措施逐步解除
27063.abstract: This paper analyzes a sequential approach to lifting interventions in the COVID-19 pandemic taking heterogeneity in the population into account. The population is heterogeneous in terms of the consequences of infection (need for hospitalization and critical care, and mortality) and in terms of labor force participation. Splitting the population in two groups by age, a less affected younger group that is more likely to work, and a more affected older group less likely to work, and lifting interventions sequentially (for the younger group first and the older group later on) can substantially reduce mortality, demands on the health care system, and the economic cost of interventions.
27063.zh_abstract: 本文分析了在考虑人口异质性的情况下，逐步解除COVID-19大流行干预措施的方法。人口在感染后果（需要住院和重症监护以及死亡率）和劳动力参与方面存在异质性。按年龄将人口分为两组：受影响较小且更可能工作的年轻组，以及受影响较大且不太可能工作的年长组。逐步解除干预措施（先针对年轻组，后针对年长组）可以显著降低死亡率、医疗系统负担以及干预措施的经济成本。
27063.meta: Programs：EFG, EH, PE；JEL：E32, E44, E65, H12, I10, I18

27062.title: Pandemic Lockdown: The Role of Government Commitment
27062.zh_title: 大流行封锁：政府承诺的作用
27062.abstract: This paper studies lockdown policy in a dynamic economy without government commitment. Lockdown imposes a cap on labor supply, which improves health prospects at the cost of economic output. A government would like to commit to the extent of future lockdowns in order to guarantee an economic outlook that supports efficient levels of investment into intermediate inputs. However, such a commitment is not credible since investments are sunk at the time when the government chooses a lockdown. As a result, lockdown under lack of commitment deviates from the optimal policy. Rules that limit a government’s lockdown discretion can improve social welfare, even in the presence of noncontractible information. Quantitatively, lack of commitment causes lockdown to be significantly more severe than is socially optimal. The output loss due to lack of commitment is greater for higher social discount rates, higher values of life, higher disease transmission rates, higher intermediate input shares, and longer vaccine arrival times.
27062.zh_abstract: 本文研究了在没有政府承诺的动态经济中的封锁政策。封锁对劳动力供给施加了上限，这改善了健康前景，但以经济产出为代价。政府希望承诺未来的封锁程度，以保证支持中间投入品有效投资水平的经济前景。然而，这种承诺并不可信，因为当政府选择封锁时，投资已经沉没。因此，缺乏承诺下的封锁偏离了最优政策。限制政府封锁自由裁量权的规则可以改善社会福利，即使存在不可合同化的信息。定量分析表明，缺乏承诺导致封锁显著比社会最优水平更严厉。缺乏承诺造成的产出损失在社会贴现率更高、生命价值更高、疾病传播率更高、中间投入份额更高以及疫苗到达时间更长的情况下更大。

27061.title: Labor Demand in the time of COVID-19: Evidence from vacancy postings and UI claims
27061.zh_title: COVID-19时期的劳动力需求：来自职位空缺发布和失业保险申领的证据
27061.authors: Eliza Forsythe, Lisa B. Kahn, Fabian Lange, David G. Wiczer
27061.abstract: We use job vacancy data collected in real time by Burning Glass Technologies, as well as unemployment insurance (UI) initial claims and the more traditional Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) employment data to study the impact of COVID-19 on the labor market. Our job vacancy data allow us to track the economy at disaggregated geography and by detailed occupation and industry. We find that job vacancies collapsed in the second half of March. By late April, they had fallen by over 40%. To a first approximation, this collapse was broad based, hitting all U.S. states, regardless of the timing of stay-at-home policies. UI claims and BLS employment data also largely match these patterns. Nearly all industries and occupations saw contraction in postings and spikes in UI claims, with little difference depending on whether they are deemed essential and whether they have work-from-home capability. Essential retail, the "front line" job most in-demand during the current crisis, took a much smaller hit, while leisure and hospitality services and non-essential retail saw the biggest collapses. This set of facts suggests the economic collapse was not caused solely by the stay-at-home orders, and is therefore unlikely to be undone simply by lifting them.
27061.zh_abstract: 我们使用Burning Glass Technologies实时收集的职位空缺数据，以及失业保险（UI）初次申领数据和更传统的劳工统计局（BLS）就业数据，研究COVID-19对劳动力市场的影响。我们的职位空缺数据使我们能够按细分地理区域以及详细职业和行业追踪经济状况。我们发现，职位空缺在3月下半月急剧下降。到4月下旬，已下降超过40%。初步来看，这种下降是广泛的，波及所有美国州，无论居家令实施时间如何。UI申领和BLS就业数据也大致符合这些模式。几乎所有行业和职业都出现职位发布收缩和UI申领激增，无论它们是否被视为必要行业以及是否具备远程办公能力，差异很小。必要零售业——当前危机中最急需的“一线”工作——受到的冲击要小得多，而休闲和酒店服务业以及非必要零售业则遭受了最大幅度的崩溃。这一系列事实表明，经济崩溃并非仅由居家令导致，因此不太可能仅通过解除居家令而逆转。

27060.title: Economic Activity and the Value of Medical Innovation during a Pandemic
27060.zh_title: 疫情期间的经济活动与医疗创新的价值
27060.abstract: The “shutdown” economy of April 2020 is compared to a normally functioning economy both in terms of market and nonmarket activities. Three novel methods and data indicate that the shutdown puts market production 25-28 percent below normal in the short run. At an annual rate, the shutdown is costing $\$7$ trillion, or about $\$15,000$ per household per quarter. Employment already fell 28 million by early April 2020. These costs indicate, among other things, the value of innovation in both health and general business sectors that can accelerate the time when normal activity resumes.
27060.zh_abstract: 本文将2020年4月的“封锁”经济与正常运转的经济在市场和非市场活动方面进行了比较。三种新颖的方法和数据表明，封锁在短期内使市场产出比正常水平低25%至28%。按年率计算，封锁造成的损失为7万亿美元，即每户每季度约15000美元。截至2020年4月初，就业人数已减少2800万。这些成本表明，在健康领域和一般商业领域，能够加速恢复正常活动时间的创新具有价值。

27059.title: Internal and External Effects of Social Distancing in a Pandemic
27059.zh_title: 疫情期间社交距离的内部和外部效应
27059.authors: Maryam Farboodi, Gregor Jarosch, Robert Shimer
27059.abstract: We develop a quantitative framework for exploring how individuals trade off the utility benefit of social activity against the internal and external health risks that come with social interactions during a pandemic. We calibrate the model to external targets and then compare its predictions with daily data on social activity, fatalities, and the estimated effective reproduction number R(t) from the COVID-19 pandemic in March-June 2020. While the laissez- faire equilibrium is consistent with much of the decline in social activity that we observed in US data, optimal policy further imposes immediate and highly persistent social distancing. Notably, neither equilibrium nor optimal social distancing is extremely restrictive, in the sense that the effective reproduction number never falls far below 1. The expected cost of COVID-19 in the US is substantial, $\$12,700$ in the laissez-faire equilibrium and $\$8,100$ per person under an optimal policy. Optimal policy generates this large welfare gain by shifting the composition of costs from fatalities to persistent social distancing.
27059.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个定量框架，用于探索个体如何在疫情期间权衡社交活动的效用收益与社交互动带来的内部和外部健康风险。我们将模型校准到外部目标，然后将其预测与2020年3月至6月COVID-19疫情期间社交活动、死亡人数和估计有效再生数R(t)的每日数据进行比较。虽然自由放任均衡与美国数据中观察到的社交活动下降大部分一致，但最优政策进一步施加了立即且高度持久的社交距离。值得注意的是，均衡和最优社交距离都不是极端限制性的，因为有效再生数从未远低于1。美国COVID-19的预期成本是巨大的，在自由放任均衡下为12700美元，在最优政策下为每人8100美元。最优政策通过将成本构成从死亡人数转向持久的社交距离，产生了这一巨大的福利收益。

27058.title: Corporate Taxes and Retail Prices
27058.authors: Scott R. Baker, Stephen Teng Sun, Constantine Yannelis
27058.abstract: Higher corporate taxes must result in lower payments to shareholders, lower wages, or higher product prices. We study the impact of corporate taxes on barcode-level product prices using linked survey and administrative data. Our empirical strategy exploits the dichotomy between the location of production and the location of sales, providing estimates free from confounding local demand shocks. We find significant effects of corporate taxes on prices with a net-of-tax elasticity of 0.24. We find null effects on prices for firms subject to personal income taxes or to full sales apportionment. Approximately half of corporate tax incidence falls on consumers, suggesting that models used by policymakers may significantly underestimate the incidence of corporate taxes on consumers. Pass-through is larger for products purchased by high-income households, higher priced goods, and in less competitive markets.
27058.zh_abstract: 更高的公司税必然导致股东支付减少、工资降低或产品价格上涨。我们利用关联的调查和行政数据，研究公司税对条形码级别产品价格的影响。我们的实证策略利用了生产地点和销售地点之间的二分法，提供了不受混杂的本地需求冲击影响的估计。我们发现公司税对价格有显著影响，税后弹性为0.24。对于缴纳个人所得税或完全按销售额分摊的公司，我们发现对价格没有影响。大约一半的公司税负担落在消费者身上，这表明政策制定者使用的模型可能严重低估了公司税对消费者的负担。对于高收入家庭购买的产品、价格较高的商品以及在竞争程度较低的市场中，转嫁效应更大。
27058.meta: Programs：CF, LE, LS, PE, PR；JEL：G38, H22, H25

27057.title: Financial Education Affects Financial Knowledge and Downstream Behaviors
27057.zh_title: 金融教育影响金融知识和后续行为
27057.authors: Tim Kaiser, Annamaria Lusardi, Lukas Menkhoff, Carly J. Urban
27057.abstract: We study the rapidly growing literature on the causal effects of financial education programs in a meta-analysis of 76 randomized experiments with a total sample size of over 160,000 individuals. The evidence shows that financial education programs have, on average, positive causal treatment effects on financial knowledge and downstream financial behaviors. Treatment effects are economically meaningful in size, similar to those realized by educational interventions in other domains, and are at least three times as large as the average effect documented in earlier work. These results are robust to the method used, restricting the sample to papers published in top economics journals, including only studies with adequate power, and accounting for publication selection bias in the literature. We conclude with a discussion of the cost-effectiveness of financial education interventions.
27057.zh_abstract: 我们在一项包含76个随机实验、总样本量超过16万人的元分析中，研究了关于金融教育项目因果效应的快速增长文献。证据表明，金融教育项目平均对金融知识和后续金融行为产生了正向因果处理效应。处理效应在经济意义上显著，与其他领域教育干预的效果相似，并且至少是早期研究记录的平均效应的三倍。这些结果对使用的方法、将样本限制在顶级经济学期刊发表的论文、仅包括具有足够统计效力的研究以及考虑文献中的发表选择偏差都是稳健的。我们最后讨论了金融教育干预的成本效益。

27056.title: Loan Types and the Bank Lending Channel
27056.zh_title: 贷款类型与银行信贷渠道
27056.authors: Victoria Ivashina, Luc Laeven, Enrique Moral-Benito
27056.abstract: Using credit-registry data for Spain and Peru, we document that four main types of commercial credit—asset-based loans, cash-flow loans, trade finance and leasing—are easily identifiable and represent the bulk of corporate credit. We show that credit dynamics and bank lending channels vary across these loan types. Moreover, aggregate credit supply shocks previously identified in the literature appear to be driven by individual loan types. The effects of monetary policy and the effects of the financial crisis propagating through banks’ balance sheets are primarily driven by cash-flow loans, whereas asset-based credit is mostly insensitive to these types of effects.
27056.zh_abstract: 利用西班牙和秘鲁的信贷登记数据，我们记录了四种主要的商业信贷类型——资产抵押贷款、现金流贷款、贸易融资和租赁——易于识别且构成了企业信贷的大部分。我们表明，信贷动态和银行信贷渠道因这些贷款类型而异。此外，先前文献中识别的总体信贷供给冲击似乎是由个别贷款类型驱动的。货币政策的影响以及通过银行资产负债表传播的金融危机影响主要由现金流贷款驱动，而资产抵押信贷对这些类型的影响大多不敏感。

27055.title: Corporate Immunity to the COVID-19 Pandemic
27055.authors: Wenzhi Ding, Ross Levine, Chen Lin, Wensi Xie
27055.abstract: Using data on over 6,000 firms across 56 economies during the first quarter of 2020, we evaluate the connection between corporate characteristics and stock price reactions to COVID-19 cases. We find that the pandemic-induced drop in stock prices was milder among firms with (a) stronger pre-2020 finances (more cash, less debt, and larger profits), (b) less exposure to COVID-19 through global supply chains and customer locations, (c) more CSR activities, and (d) less entrenched executives. Furthermore, the stock prices of firms with greater hedge fund ownership performed worse, and those of firms with larger non-financial corporate ownership performed better. We believe ours is the first paper to assess international, cross-firm stock price reactions to COVID-19 as functions of these pre-shock corporate characteristics.
27055.zh_abstract: 利用2020年第一季度56个经济体超过6000家企业的数据，我们评估了企业特征与股票价格对COVID-19病例反应之间的关联。我们发现，在以下企业中，疫情导致的股价下跌较为温和：(a) 2020年前财务状况更强（现金更多、债务更少、利润更大）；(b) 通过全球供应链和客户地点对COVID-19的暴露较少；(c) 企业社会责任活动更多；(d) 高管权力不那么根深蒂固。此外，对冲基金持股比例较高的企业股价表现更差，而非金融企业持股比例较高的企业股价表现更好。我们相信，我们是第一篇评估国际跨企业股票价格对COVID-19反应作为这些冲击前企业特征函数的论文。

27054.title: Information and the Persistence of the Gender Wage Gap: Early Evidence from California's Salary History Ban
27054.zh_title: 信息与性别工资差距的持续性：加州薪资历史禁令的早期证据
27054.abstract: Aiming to reduce the gender wage gap, several states and cities have recently adopted legislation that prohibits employers from asking about previously earned salaries. The advocates of these salary history bans (SHBs) have suggested pay history perpetuates past discrimination. We study the early net impact of the first state-wide SHBs. Using both difference-in-difference and synthetic control approaches, we find the gender earnings ratio increased by 1 percent in states with SHBs. We find these population wide increases are driven by an increase of the gender earnings ratio for households with all children over 5 years old, by workers over 35, and are principally driven by those who have recently switched jobs.
27054.zh_abstract: 为了缩小性别工资差距，几个州和城市最近通过了禁止雇主询问先前薪资的立法。这些薪资历史禁令的支持者认为，薪资历史会延续过去的歧视。我们研究了首批州级薪资历史禁令的早期净影响。使用双重差分和合成控制方法，我们发现实施薪资历史禁令的州中，性别收入比率提高了1%。我们发现这些总体增长是由所有子女年龄超过5岁的家庭、35岁以上工人的性别收入比率提高驱动的，并且主要由最近换工作的人推动。
27054.meta: Programs：CH, LE, LS；JEL：J16, J3, J31, J42, J48, J58, J7, K0

27053.title: Persistence Despite Revolutions
27053.authors: Alberto F. Alesina, Marlon Seror, David Y. Yang, Yang You, Weihong Zeng
27053.abstract: Can efforts to eradicate inequality in wealth and education eliminate intergenerational persistence of socioeconomic status? The Chinese Communist Revolution and Cultural Revolution aimed to do exactly that. Using newly digitized archival records and contemporary census and household survey data, we show that the revolutions were effective in homogenizing the population economically in the short run. However, the pattern of inequality that characterized the pre-revolution generation re-emerges today. Almost half a century after the revolutions, individuals whose grandparents belonged to the pre-revolution elite earn 16 percent more income and have completed more than 11 percent additional years of schooling than those from non-elite households. We find evidence that human capital (such as knowledge, skills, and values) has been transmitted within the families, and the social capital embodied in kinship networks has survived the revolutions. These channels allow the pre-revolution elite to rebound after the revolutions, and their socioeconomic status persists despite one of the most aggressive attempts to eliminate differences in the population.
27053.zh_abstract: 消除财富和教育不平等的努力能否消除社会经济地位的代际传递？中国共产党革命和文化大革命正是旨在实现这一目标。利用新数字化的档案记录以及当代人口普查和家庭调查数据，我们表明这些革命在短期内有效地实现了人口的经济同质化。然而，革命前一代特征的不平等模式如今重新出现。革命后近半个世纪，祖父母属于革命前精英阶层的个人比来自非精英家庭的个人收入高出16%，受教育年限多出11%以上。我们发现有证据表明，人力资本（如知识、技能和价值观）在家庭内部传递，而体现在亲属网络中的社会资本在革命中幸存下来。这些渠道使得革命前精英在革命后得以反弹，尽管经历了最激进的消除人口差异的尝试之一，他们的社会经济地位仍然持续存在。

27052.title: Does the US Tax Code Favor Automation?
27052.zh_title: 美国税法是否偏向自动化？
27052.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Andrea Manera, Pascual Restrepo
27052.abstract: We argue that the US tax system is biased against labor and in favor of capital and has become more so in recent years. As a consequence, it has promoted inefficiently high levels of automation. Moving from the US tax system in the 2010s to optimal taxation of capital and labor would raise employment by 4.02% and the labor share by 0.78 percentage points, and restore the optimal level of automation. If moving to optimal taxes is infeasible, more modest reforms can still increase employment by 1.14–1.96%, but in this case efficiency can be increased by imposing an additional automation tax to reduce the equilibrium level of automation. This is because marginal automated tasks do not bring much productivity gains but displace workers, reducing employment below its socially optimal level. We additionally show that reducing labor taxes or combining lower capital taxes with automation taxes can increase employment much more than the uniform reductions in capital taxes enacted between 2000 and 2018.
27052.zh_abstract: 我们认为美国税收体系偏向资本而非劳动，且近年来这种偏向性有所加剧。其后果是导致了低效的高水平自动化。若将2010年代的美国税收体系转向资本与劳动的最优税收，就业率将提升4.02%，劳动收入份额将提高0.78个百分点，并恢复最优自动化水平。若无法实现最优税收，更温和的改革仍可使就业增长1.14%至1.96%，但此时需额外征收自动化税以降低均衡自动化水平，从而提高效率。这是因为边际自动化任务并未带来显著生产率提升，反而替代工人，使就业低于社会最优水平。我们还发现，降低劳动税或将降低资本税与自动化税相结合，比2000年至2018年间实施的统一降低资本税更能大幅提升就业。

27051.title: A Sticky-Price View of Hoarding
27051.zh_title: 囤积行为的价格粘性视角
27051.authors: Christopher Hansman, Harrison Hong, Áureo de Paula, Vishal Singh
27051.abstract: We show that sticky prices exacerbate household hoarding of storable goods. When stores are slow to adjust prices following a cost shock, households have an incentive to stockpile just as in a typical retail sale. This incentive is present even in the absence of traditional panic or precautionary motives for hoarding. Using detailed US supermarket scanner data covering the 2008 global rice crisis—a shock triggered by an Indian rice export ban—we find that household hoarding anticipated retail price adjustments. We construct forecast tests relating the cross-section of product or store-level price adjustments to the expectations implied by consumer purchases. Bias and efficiency tests reject panic/precautionary motives in favor of a sticky-price view.
27051.zh_abstract: 我们证明价格粘性会加剧家庭对可储存商品的囤积。当商店在成本冲击后缓慢调整价格时，家庭有动机囤积商品，这与典型的零售促销行为类似。即使缺乏传统的恐慌或预防性囤积动机，这种激励依然存在。利用涵盖2008年全球大米危机（由印度大米出口禁令引发的冲击）的美国超市扫描数据，我们发现家庭囤积行为预期到了零售价格调整。我们构建了预测检验，将产品或商店层面的价格调整横截面与消费者购买所隐含的预期联系起来。偏差检验和效率检验否定了恐慌/预防性动机，支持了价格粘性观点。

27050.title: It Takes a Village: The Economics of Parenting with Neighborhood and Peer Effects
27050.zh_title: 养育一个孩子需举全村之力：邻里与同伴效应下的育儿经济学
27050.authors: Francesco Agostinelli, Matthias Doepke, Giuseppe Sorrenti, Fabrizio Zilibotti
27050.abstract: As children reach adolescence, peer interactions become increasingly central to their development, whereas the direct influence of parents wanes. Nevertheless, parents may continue to exert leverage by shaping their children's peer groups. We study interactions of parenting style and peer effects in a model where children's skill accumulation depends on both parental inputs and peers, and where parents can affect the peer group by restricting who their children can interact with. We estimate the model and show that it can capture empirical patterns regarding the interaction of peer characteristics, parental behavior, and skill accumulation among US high school students. We use the estimated model for policy simulations. We find that interventions (e.g., busing) that move children to a more favorable neighborhood have large effects but lose impact when they are scaled up because parents' equilibrium responses push against successful integration with the new peer group.
27050.zh_abstract: 随着儿童进入青春期，同伴互动对其发展日益重要，而父母的直接影响逐渐减弱。然而，父母仍可通过塑造子女的同伴群体来施加影响。我们研究了一个模型中育儿方式与同伴效应的相互作用，其中儿童技能积累取决于父母投入和同伴，且父母可通过限制子女的交往对象来影响同伴群体。我们估计了该模型，并证明它能捕捉美国高中生中同伴特征、父母行为与技能积累相互作用的经验模式。我们利用估计模型进行政策模拟。研究发现，将儿童迁移至更有利社区（如校车计划）的干预措施效果显著，但大规模实施时效果减弱，因为父母的均衡反应阻碍了与新同伴群体的成功融合。

27049.title: Non-Pharmaceutical Interventions and Mortality in U.S. Cities during the Great Influenza Pandemic, 1918-1919
27049.zh_title: 1918-1919年大流感期间美国城市的非药物干预与死亡率
27049.abstract: A key issue for the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic is whether non-pharmaceutical public-health interventions (NPIs) retard death rates. Good information about these effects comes from flu-related excess deaths in large U.S. cities during the second wave of the Great Influenza Pandemic, September 1918-February 1919. NPIs, as measured by an extension of Markel, et al. (2007), are in three categories: school closings, prohibitions on public gatherings, and quarantine/isolation. Although an increase in NPIs flattened the curve in the sense of reducing the ratio of peak to average death rates, the estimated effect on overall deaths is small and statistically insignificant. One possibility is that the NPIs were not more successful in curtailing overall mortality because the average duration of each type of NPI was only around one month. Another possibility is that NPIs mainly delay deaths rather than eliminating them.
27049.zh_abstract: 当前COVID-19疫情的一个关键问题是，非药物公共卫生干预措施（NPI）能否降低死亡率。关于这些效应的可靠信息来自1918年9月至1919年2月大流感第二波期间美国大城市的流感相关超额死亡数据。根据Markel等人（2007）的扩展衡量，NPI分为三类：关闭学校、禁止公共集会以及隔离/检疫。尽管NPI的增加在降低峰值与平均死亡率之比的意义上使曲线趋平，但对总死亡率的估计影响较小且统计上不显著。一种可能性是，NPI未能更成功地遏制总死亡率，是因为每类NPI的平均持续时间仅约一个月。另一种可能性是，NPI主要延迟死亡而非消除死亡。

27048.title: Elusive Safety: The New Geography of Capital Flows and Risk
27048.zh_title: 难以捉摸的安全：资本流动与风险的新地理格局
27048.authors: Laura Alfaro, Ester Faia, Ruth A. Judson, Tim Schmidt-Eisenlohr
27048.abstract: A confidential dataset with industry-level disaggregation of U.S. cross-border claims and liabilities, shows U.S. securities to be increasingly intermediated by tax-haven-financial-centers (THFC) and less regulated funds. These securities are risky, in intangible-intensive sectors, requiring higher Sharpe ratios; while the foreign-official sector mainly holds Treasuries. Facts on private securities are rationalized through a model where firms with heterogeneous default probabilities, and funded by global intermediaries, endogenously locate affiliates in THFCs. A decline in the cost of funds or in THFC's taxes/regulation, raises profits and firms' incentives to enter THFCs. Firms appear elusively safe, intermediaries reduce monitoring incentives and debt risk increases.
27048.zh_abstract: 一份包含美国跨境债权与负债行业细分数据的机密数据集显示，美国证券越来越多地通过避税天堂金融中心（THFC）和监管较少的基金进行中介。这些证券风险较高，集中于无形资产密集型行业，需要更高的夏普比率；而外国官方部门主要持有美国国债。关于私人证券的事实通过一个模型得到合理化解释，该模型中，具有异质性违约概率的企业由全球中介机构融资，并内生地在THFC设立附属机构。资金成本或THFC税收/监管的下降会提高利润和企业进入THFC的动机。企业看似安全，中介机构减少监督激励，债务风险随之增加。
27048.meta: Programs：CF, IFM, ITI；JEL：F2, F3, F4, G15

27047.title: Macroeconomic Dynamics and Reallocation in an Epidemic: Evaluating the “Swedish Solution”
27047.zh_title: 疫情中的宏观经济动态与再配置：评估“瑞典方案”
27047.authors: Dirk Krueger, Harald Uhlig, Taojun Xie
27047.abstract: In this paper, we argue that endogenous shifts in private consumption behavior across sectors of the economy can act as a potent mitigation mechanism during an epidemic or when the economy is re-opened after a temporary lockdown. We introduce a SIR epidemiological model into a neoclassical production economy in which goods are distinguished by the degree to which they can be consumed at home rather than in a social, possibly contagious context. We demonstrate that within the model the “Swedish solution” of letting the epidemic play out without government intervention and allowing agents to shift their consumption behavior towards relatively safe sectors can lead to substantial mitigation of the economic and human costs of the COVID-19 crisis. We estimate the model on Swedish health data and then show that compared to a model in which sectors are assumed to be homogeneous in their infection risk, as in Eichenbaum, Rebelo, and Trabandt (2020), endogenous sectoral reallocation avoids more than 2/3 of the decline in aggregate output and consumption, and at the same time induces a dynamics of weekly death that accords very well with the matching and of the number of deaths within one year. Our analysis implies case fatality rates below 0.2 percent and a limit of less than 800 deaths per million for Sweden. We also characterize the allocation a social planner would choose that can dictate sectoral consumption patterns and demonstrate that the laissez-faire outcome with sectoral reallocation, while mitigating the economic and health crisis, still implies suboptimally many deaths and too massive a decline in economic activity.
27047.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们认为，疫情期间或经济在临时封锁后重新开放时，私人消费行为在经济各部门间的内生转变可以作为一种有效的缓解机制。我们将SIR流行病学模型引入新古典生产经济，其中商品根据其在家消费而非在可能具有传染性的社交场合消费的程度进行区分。我们证明，在该模型中，让疫情在没有政府干预的情况下自然发展，并允许代理人将消费行为转向相对安全的部门，这种“瑞典方案”可以显著缓解COVID-19危机的经济和人员成本。我们利用瑞典健康数据估计模型，然后证明，与Eichenbaum、Rebelo和Trabandt（2020）中假设各部门感染风险同质的模型相比，内生部门再配置避免了总产出和消费下降的三分之二以上，同时引发的每周死亡动态与一年内死亡人数的匹配非常吻合。我们的分析表明，瑞典的病例死亡率低于0.2%，每百万人死亡人数上限低于800人。我们还刻画了社会计划者可能选择的、能够指导部门消费模式的配置，并证明，尽管部门再配置下的自由放任结果缓解了经济和健康危机，但仍意味着次优的过多死亡和经济活动过于剧烈的下降。
27047.meta: Programs：AG, EFG, EH, ITI, LS, PE；JEL：E20, E30, E52

27046.title: Health versus Wealth: On the Distributional Effects of Controlling a Pandemic
27046.zh_title: 健康与财富：论控制疫情的收入分配效应
27046.authors: Andrew Glover, Jonathan Heathcote, Dirk Krueger, José-Víctor Ríos-Rull
27046.abstract: To slow the spread of the COVID-19 virus, many countries shut down parts of the economy. Older individuals have the most to gain from slowing virus diffusion. Younger workers in sectors that are shuttered have most to lose. We build a model in which economic activity and disease progression are jointly determined. Individuals differ by age (young, retired), by sector (basic, luxury), and by health status. Disease transmission occurs in the workplace, through consumption, at home, and in hospitals. We study the optimal economic mitigation policy for a government that can redistribute through taxes and transfers, but where taxation distorts labor supply. We show that shutdowns are optimally milder in 2020 when taxes are distortionary, and when the government does not have access to debt. A harder but shorter shutdown is preferred when vaccines become available in the first half of 2021.
27046.zh_abstract: 为减缓COVID-19病毒的传播，许多国家关闭了部分经济部门。老年人从减缓病毒传播中获益最多。被关闭部门的年轻工人损失最大。我们构建了一个经济活动与疾病进展共同决定的模型。个体按年龄（年轻、退休）、部门（基础、奢侈品）和健康状况区分。疾病传播发生在工作场所、消费过程中、家庭内和医院中。我们研究了一个能够通过税收和转移支付进行再分配、但税收会扭曲劳动供给的政府的最优经济缓解政策。我们证明，当税收具有扭曲性且政府无法举债时，2020年的封锁最优程度更为温和。当疫苗在2021年上半年可用时，更严厉但更短的封锁更受青睐。
27046.meta: Programs：AG, EFG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：E20, E30

27045.title: Income Segregation: Up or Down, and for Whom?
27045.zh_title: 收入隔离：上升还是下降，对谁而言？
27045.authors: John R. Logan, Andrew Foster, Hongwei Xu, Wenquan Zhang
27045.abstract: Reports of rising income segregation have been brought into question by the observation that post-2000 estimates are upwardly biased due to a reduction in the sample sizes on which they are based. Recent studies have offered estimates of this “sample-count” bias using public data. We show here that there are two substantial sources of systematic bias in estimating segregation levels: bias associated with sample size and bias associated with using weighted sample data. We rely on new correction methods using the original census sample data for individual households to provide more accurate estimates. Family income segregation rose markedly in the 1980s but only selectively after 1990. For some categories of families, segregation declined after 1990. There has been an upward trend for families with children, but not specifically for families with children in the upper or lower 10% of the income distribution. Separate analyses by race/ethnicity show that segregation was not generally higher among blacks and Hispanics than among white families, and evidence of segregation trends for these separate groups is mixed. Trends vary for specific combinations of race/ethnicity, presence of children, and location in the income distribution, offering new challenges for understanding the underlying processes of change.
27045.zh_abstract: 关于收入隔离上升的报告因以下观察而受到质疑：2000年后的估计值因所依据的样本量减少而存在向上偏差。近期研究利用公开数据提供了这种“样本计数”偏差的估计。我们在此表明，估计隔离水平存在两个主要的系统性偏差来源：与样本量相关的偏差和与使用加权样本数据相关的偏差。我们依赖使用原始人口普查样本数据（针对个体家庭）的新校正方法，以提供更准确的估计。家庭收入隔离在1980年代显著上升，但1990年后仅选择性上升。对于某些家庭类别，1990年后隔离程度有所下降。有子女家庭的隔离呈上升趋势，但并非特指收入分布中处于上10%或下10%的有子女家庭。按种族/族裔分别分析显示，黑人和西班牙裔家庭的隔离程度通常并不高于白人家庭，且这些群体隔离趋势的证据不一。不同种族/族裔、是否有子女以及收入分布位置的特定组合，其趋势各不相同，这为理解变化背后的过程带来了新的挑战。

27044.title: A Model of Endogenous Risk Intolerance and LSAPs: Asset Prices and Aggregate Demand in a “Covid-19” Shock
27044.zh_title: 内生风险厌恶与大规模资产购买模型：新冠疫情冲击下的资产价格与总需求
27044.abstract: In this paper we: (i) provide a model of the endogenous risk intolerance and severe asset price and aggregate demand contractions following an adverse real (non-financial) shock; and (ii) demonstrate the effectiveness of Large Scale Asset Purchases (LSAPs) in addressing these contractions. The key mechanism stems from heterogeneous risk tolerance: as a recessionary shock hits the economy and brings down asset prices, risk-tolerant agents’ wealth share declines and their leverage rises endogenously. This reduces the market’s risk tolerance and generates downward pressure on asset prices and aggregate demand. When monetary policy is unconstrained, it can offset the decline in risk tolerance with an interest rate cut that boosts the market’s Sharpe ratio. However, if the interest rate policy is constrained, new contractionary feedbacks arise: recessionary shocks lead to further asset price and output drops, which feed the risk-o¤ episode and trigger a downward loop. In this context, LSAPs improve asset prices and aggregate demand by transferring risk to the government’s balance sheet, which reduces the market’s required Sharpe ratio and reverses the contractionary feedbacks. Quantitatively, we show that aggregate shocks and LSAPs have large impacts on asset prices when the model is calibrated to fit the inelastic demand for aggregate assets uncovered in recent literature. We also show that heterogeneity in risk tolerance explains part of the demand inelasticity in normal times, and further reduces the elasticity after a recessionary shock. The Covid-19 shock and the large response by all major central banks provide a vivid illustration of the environment we seek to capture.
27044.zh_abstract: 本文中我们：(i) 构建了一个模型，用以解释在不利的实际（非金融）冲击之后，内生性风险厌恶以及资产价格和总需求的严重收缩；(ii) 论证了大规模资产购买（LSAPs）在应对这些收缩方面的有效性。关键机制源于异质性风险容忍度：当衰退冲击冲击经济并压低资产价格时，风险容忍型代理人的财富份额下降，其杠杆率内生性上升。这降低了市场的风险容忍度，并对资产价格和总需求产生下行压力。当货币政策不受约束时，它可以通过降息来提升市场的夏普比率，从而抵消风险容忍度的下降。然而，如果利率政策受到约束，新的收缩性反馈就会出现：衰退冲击导致资产价格和产出进一步下降，这反过来又加剧了风险事件，并触发下行循环。在此背景下，大规模资产购买通过将风险转移至政府资产负债表来改善资产价格和总需求，这降低了市场所需的夏普比率，并逆转了收缩性反馈。在定量分析中，我们表明，当模型校准以匹配近期文献中揭示的总资产无弹性需求时，总体冲击和大规模资产购买对资产价格具有巨大影响。我们还表明，风险容忍度的异质性解释了正常时期部分需求缺乏弹性的原因，并在衰退冲击后进一步降低了弹性。新冠疫情冲击以及所有主要央行的巨大应对措施，生动地说明了我们试图捕捉的环境。
27044.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：E00, E12, E21, E22, E30, E40, G00, G01, G11

27043.title: Demographic Perspectives on Mortality of Covid-19 and Other Epidemics
27043.zh_title: 从人口学视角看新冠疫情及其他流行病的死亡率
27043.authors: Joshua R. Goldstein, Ronald D. Lee
27043.abstract: What would a hypothetical one million US deaths in the Covid-19 epidemic mean for mortality of individuals at the population level? To put estimates of Covid-19 mortality into perspective, we estimate age-specific mortality for an epidemic claiming for illustrative purposes one million US lives, with results scalable over a broad range of deaths. We calculate the impact on period life expectancy (down 3 years) and remaining life-years (12.3 years per death), which for one million deaths can be valued at six to 10 trillion dollars. The age-patterns of Covid-19 mortality observed in other countries are remarkably similar and exhibit the typical rate of increase by age of normal mortality. The scenario of one million Covid-19 deaths is similar in scale to the decades-long HIV/AIDS and opioid-overdose epidemics but considerably smaller than the Spanish Flu of 1918. Unlike HIV/AIDS and opioid epidemics, the Covid-19 deaths will be concentrated in months rather than spread out over decades.
27043.zh_abstract: 假设新冠疫情在美国导致一百万人死亡，这对人口层面的个体死亡率意味着什么？为了将新冠疫情死亡率的估计值置于背景中，我们估算了假设性流行病（为说明目的假设导致一百万美国人死亡）的年龄别死亡率，其结果可在广泛的死亡人数范围内进行缩放。我们计算了对时期预期寿命（下降3年）和剩余生命年数（每例死亡12.3年）的影响，对于一百万例死亡，其价值可估值为6至10万亿美元。在其他国家观察到的新冠疫情死亡率的年龄模式非常相似，并表现出与正常死亡率随年龄增长而增加的典型速率。一百万例新冠死亡的情景在规模上与持续数十年的艾滋病毒/艾滋病和阿片类药物过量流行病相似，但远小于1918年的西班牙流感。与艾滋病毒/艾滋病和阿片类药物流行病不同，新冠死亡将集中在数月内，而非分散在数十年间。

27042.title: Which Retail Outlets Generate the Most Physical Interactions?
27042.zh_title: 哪些零售门店产生的物理互动最多？
27042.abstract: This paper seeks to answer the simple question of what category of retail outlets generates the most physical interactions in the regular course of life. In this way, we aim to bring a marketing perspective to discussions about which businesses may be most risky from the standpoint of spreading contagious disease. We use detailed data from people's mobile devices prior to the implementation of social distancing measures in the United States. With this data, we examine a number of potential indicators of risk of contagion: The absolute number of visits and visitors, how many of the visits are generated by the same people, the median average distance traveled by the visitor to the retailer, and the number of customers from Canada and Mexico. We find that retailers with a single outlet tend to attract relatively few visitors, fewer one-off visitors, and have fewer international customers. For retailers that have multiple stores the patterns are non-linear. Retailers that have such a large number of stores that they are ubiquitous, tend to exhibit fewer visits and visitors and attract customers from a smaller distance. However, retailers that have a large enough footprint to be well known, but not large enough to be ubiquitous tend to attract a large number of visitors who make one-off visits, travel a long distance, and are disproportionately international.
27042.zh_abstract: 本文旨在回答一个简单问题：在日常生活中，哪类零售门店产生的物理互动最多？通过这种方式，我们旨在从营销视角为关于哪些企业从传播传染病的角度来看可能风险最大的讨论提供信息。我们使用了美国实施社交距离措施之前人们移动设备的详细数据。利用这些数据，我们考察了若干潜在的传染风险指标：访问次数和访客的绝对数量、其中有多少访问是由同一人产生的、访客到零售商的中位平均旅行距离，以及来自加拿大和墨西哥的顾客数量。我们发现，拥有单一门店的零售商往往吸引相对较少的访客、较少的一次性访客，并且国际顾客也较少。对于拥有多家门店的零售商，其模式是非线性的。那些门店数量众多以至于无处不在的零售商，往往表现出较少的访问次数和访客，并吸引来自较近距离的顾客。然而，那些足迹足够大以至于广为人知，但尚未大到无处不在的零售商，往往吸引大量访客，这些访客进行一次性访问，旅行距离较远，并且国际顾客比例过高。

27041.title: Bilateral Information Disclosure in Adverse Selection Markets with Nonexclusive Competition
27041.zh_title: 非排他性竞争下逆向选择市场中的双边信息披露
27041.authors: Joseph E. Stiglitz, Jungyoll Yun, Andrew Kosenko
27041.abstract: We study insurance markets with nonexclusive contracts, introducing bilateral endogenous information disclosure about insurance sales and purchases by firms and consumers. We show that a competitive equilibrium exists under remarkably mild conditions, and characterize the unique equilibrium outcome. With two types of consumers the outcome consists of a pooling contract which maximizes the well-being of the low risk type (along the zero profit pooling line) plus a supplemental (undisclosed and nonexclusive) contract that brings the high risk type to full insurance (at his own odds). We show that this outcome is extremely robust and constrained Pareto efficient. Consumer disclosure and asymmetric equilibrium information flows are critical in supporting the equilibrium.
27041.zh_abstract: 我们研究了具有非排他性合同的保险市场，引入了企业和消费者关于保险销售和购买的双边内生信息披露。我们表明，在非常温和的条件下存在竞争均衡，并刻画了唯一的均衡结果。在两类消费者的情况下，结果包括一个使低风险类型福利最大化的混合合同（沿着零利润混合线），以及一个补充性的（未披露且非排他性的）合同，该合同使高风险类型获得完全保险（按其自身概率）。我们表明，这一结果极其稳健且是受约束的帕累托有效。消费者披露和不对称的均衡信息流对于支持该均衡至关重要。

27040.title: Immigration Policy Levers for US Innovation and Startups
27040.zh_title: 促进美国创新与初创企业的移民政策杠杆
27040.authors: Sari Pekkala Kerr, William R. Kerr
27040.abstract: Immigrants account for about a quarter of US invention and entrepreneurship despite a policy environment that is not well suited for these purposes. This chapter reviews the US immigration policy environment that governs how skilled migrants move to America for employment-based purposes. We discuss points of strain in the current system and potential policy reforms that would likely increase the rate of innovation and the number of startups due to immigrants in the country. Key areas include adjustments to the allocation of permanent residency visas, adjustments to the H-1B visa program, and the creation of an immigrant startup visa.
27040.zh_abstract: 尽管政策环境并不完全适合这些目的，但移民仍约占美国发明和创业的四分之一。本章回顾了管理技术移民如何因就业目的移居美国的美国移民政策环境。我们讨论了当前系统中的压力点，以及可能因移民在美国而提高创新率和初创企业数量的潜在政策改革。关键领域包括调整永久居留签证的分配、调整H-1B签证计划，以及创建移民初创企业签证。
27040.meta: Programs：LS, PR；JEL：F22, F23, J15, J44, J61, L26, M13, O31, O32, O33

27039.title: Voluntary and Mandatory Social Distancing: Evidence on COVID-19 Exposure Rates from Chinese Provinces and Selected Countries
27039.zh_title: 自愿与强制社交距离：来自中国各省份及若干国家的COVID-19暴露率证据
27039.authors: Alexander Chudik, M. Hashem Pesaran, Alessandro Rebucci
27039.abstract: This paper considers a modification of the standard Susceptible-Infected-Recovered (SIR) model of epidemic that allows for different degrees of compulsory as well as voluntary social distancing. It is shown that the fraction of population that self-isolates varies with the perceived probability of contracting the disease. Implications of social distancing both on the epidemic and recession curves are investigated and their trade off is simulated under a number of different social distancing and economic participation scenarios. We show that mandating social distancing is very effective at flattening the epidemic curve, but is costly in terms of employment loss. However, if targeted towards individuals most likely to spread the infection, the employment loss can be somewhat reduced. We also show that voluntary self-isolation driven by individual’s perceived risk of becoming infected kicks in only towards the peak of the epidemic and has little or no impact on flattening the epidemic curve.
