Using available statistics and correcting for measurement errors, we estimate the rate of exposure to COVID-19 for 21 Chinese provinces and a selected number of countries. The exposure rates are generally small, but vary considerably between Hubei and other Chinese provinces as well as across countries. Strikingly, the exposure rate in Hubei province is around 40 times larger than the rates for other Chinese provinces, with the exposure rates for some European countries being 3-5 times larger than Hubei (the epicenter of the epidemic). The paper also provides country-specific estimates of the recovery rate, showing it to be about 21 days (a week longer than the 14 days typically assumed), and relatively homogeneous across Chinese provinces and for a selected number of countries.
27039.zh_abstract: 本文考虑对标准易感-感染-康复（SIR）流行病模型进行修改，以允许不同程度的强制以及自愿社交距离。研究表明，自我隔离的人口比例随感知到的患病概率而变化。我们研究了社交距离对流行病曲线和衰退曲线的影响，并在多种不同的社交距离和经济参与情景下模拟了它们的权衡。我们表明，强制社交距离在拉平流行病曲线方面非常有效，但代价是就业损失。然而，如果针对最可能传播感染的个体，就业损失可以有所减少。我们还表明，由个体感知到的感染风险驱动的自愿自我隔离仅在流行病高峰期附近才开始起作用，并且对拉平流行病曲线几乎没有影响。利用现有统计数据并修正测量误差，我们估算了中国21个省份和若干选定国家的COVID-19暴露率。暴露率普遍较低，但在湖北省与其他中国省份之间以及各国之间存在显著差异。引人注目的是，湖北省的暴露率大约是中国其他省份的40倍，而一些欧洲国家的暴露率是湖北省（疫情中心）的3-5倍。本文还提供了国家特定的康复率估计，显示约为21天（比通常假设的14天长一周），并且在中国各省份和若干选定国家中相对同质。
27039.meta: Programs：EFG, EH, IFM, LS, PE, POL；JEL：C40, D0, E7, F60, I12

27038.title: Managing Intelligence: Skilled Experts and AI in Markets for Complex Products
27038.zh_title: 管理智慧：复杂产品市场中的熟练专家与人工智能
27038.authors: Jonathan Gruber, Benjamin R. Handel, Samuel H. Kina, Jonathan T. Kolstad
27038.abstract: In numerous high stakes markets skilled experts play a key role in facilitating consumer choice of complex products. New artificial intelligence (AI) technologies are increasingly being used to augment expert decisions. We study the role of technology and expertise in the market for health insurance, where consumer choices are widely known to be sub-optimal. Our analysis leverages the large-scale implementation of an AI-based decision support tool in a private Medicare exchange where consumers are randomized to skilled agents over time. We find that, prior to AI-based technology, skilled experts in this market exhibit the same type of inconsistent behavior found in previous studies of individual choices, costing consumers $\$1260$ on average. The addition of AI-based decision support improves outcomes by $\$278$ on average and substantially reduces heterogeneity in broker performance. Experts efficiently synthesize private information, incorporating AI-based recommendations along dimensions that are well suited to AI (e.g. total expected patient costs), but overruling AI-based recommendations along dimensions for which humans are better suited (e.g. specifics of doctor networks). As a result, switching plans, an ex-post measure of plan satisfaction, is meaningfully lower for agents making AI-based recommendations. While AI is a complement to skill on average, we find that it is a substitute across the skill distribution; lower quality agents provide better recommendations with AI than the top agents did without it. Overall productivity rises, with the introduction of decision support associated with a 21% reduction in call time for enrollment.
27038.zh_abstract: 在许多高风险市场中，熟练专家在促进消费者选择复杂产品方面发挥着关键作用。新的人工智能技术正越来越多地被用于增强专家决策。我们研究了技术和专业知识在健康保险市场中的作用，该市场中消费者的选择被广泛认为是次优的。我们的分析利用了在一个私人医疗保险交易所中大规模实施基于人工智能的决策支持工具的情况，在该交易所中，消费者随时间被随机分配给熟练的代理人。我们发现，在基于人工智能的技术出现之前，该市场中的熟练专家表现出与先前关于个体选择的研究中发现的相同类型的不一致行为，平均使消费者损失1260美元。基于人工智能的决策支持的加入平均改善了278美元的结果，并显著减少了经纪人表现的异质性。专家有效地综合了私人信息，在适合人工智能的维度（例如，患者预期总成本）上采纳基于人工智能的建议，但在人类更擅长的维度（例如，医生网络的具体细节）上否决基于人工智能的建议。因此，对于做出基于人工智能建议的代理人来说，换保计划（一种事后衡量计划满意度的指标）显著更低。虽然平均而言人工智能是对技能的补充，但我们发现它在技能分布中是一种替代品；质量较低的代理人使用人工智能提供的建议比顶级代理人没有人工智能时提供的建议更好。总体生产率提高，决策支持的引入与通话时间减少21%相关。
27038.meta: Programs：AG, EH, IO, PE；JEL：I13, J24, L15

27037.title: Evidence on Job Search Models from a Survey of Unemployed Workers in Germany
27037.zh_title: 来自德国失业工人调查的求职模型证据
27037.authors: Stefano DellaVigna, Jörg Heining, Johannes F. Schmieder, Simon Trenkle
27037.abstract: The job finding rate of Unemployment Insurance (UI) recipients declines in the initial months of unemployment and then exhibits a spike at the benefit exhaustion point. A range of theoretical explanations have been proposed, but those are hard to disentangle using data on job finding alone. To better understand the underlying mechanisms, we conducted a large text-message-based survey of unemployed workers in Germany. We surveyed 6,349 UI recipients twice a week for 4 months about their job search effort. The panel structure allows us to observe how search effort evolves within individuals over the unemployment spell. We provide three key facts: 1) search effort is flat early on in the UI spell, 2) search effort exhibits an increase up to UI exhaustion and a decrease thereafter, 3) UI recipients do not appear to time job start dates to coincide with the UI exhaustion point. A standard search model with unobserved heterogeneity struggles to explain the second fact, and a model of storable offers is not consistent with the third fact. The patterns are well captured by a model of reference-dependent job search or by a model with duration dependence in search cost.
27037.zh_abstract: 失业保险领取者的工作发现率在失业的最初几个月下降，然后在福利耗尽点出现一个峰值。已经提出了一系列理论解释，但仅使用工作发现数据很难厘清这些解释。为了更好地理解潜在机制，我们对德国的失业工人进行了一项基于短信的大规模调查。我们在4个月内每周两次对6349名失业保险领取者进行关于其求职努力的调查。面板结构使我们能够观察个体在失业期间内求职努力的演变。我们提供了三个关键事实：1) 在失业保险期的早期，求职努力是平稳的；2) 求职努力在失业保险耗尽前增加，之后减少；3) 失业保险领取者似乎不会将工作开始日期安排在与失业保险耗尽点重合的时间。一个具有未观测异质性的标准搜索模型难以解释第二个事实，而一个可存储工作机会的模型与第三个事实不一致。这些模式可以被一个参考依赖的求职模型或一个搜索成本具有持续时间依赖性的模型很好地捕捉。

27036.title: Price Discovery and Liquidity Recovery: Forex Market Reactions to Macro Announcements
27036.zh_title: 价格发现与流动性恢复：外汇市场对宏观公告的反应
27036.abstract: We examine whether the forex market quality, measured by the speed of price discovery and liquidity recovery after macro statistics announcements, has improved using the EBS high-frequency data for 20 years. Considering the recent rise of computer-based trading, a popular conjecture is that the market quality has improved. Our empirical analysis, however, suggests that an improving trend is only observed in price discovery. Moreover, two measures are negatively correlated because an increasing number of traders improves liquidity but slows down price discovery. Theoretically, the latter finding implies that “fast” traders have a poor interpretation of how the news will impact prices.
27036.zh_abstract: 我们利用EBS高频数据，研究了20年来宏观统计数据公告后外汇市场质量（以价格发现速度和流动性恢复速度衡量）是否有所改善。鉴于近年来计算机化交易的兴起，一个普遍的猜想是市场质量已经提高。然而，我们的实证分析表明，改善趋势仅在价格发现方面被观察到。此外，这两个指标呈负相关，因为交易者数量的增加改善了流动性，但减缓了价格发现。从理论上讲，后一个发现意味着“快速”交易者对新闻将如何影响价格的理解较差。

27035.title: Saving for Multiple Financial Needs: Evidence from Lockboxes and Mobile Money in Malawi
27035.zh_title: 为多种财务需求储蓄：来自马拉维锁箱和移动货币的证据
27035.authors: Shilpa Aggarwal, Valentina Brailovskaya, Jonathan Robinson
27035.abstract: We test whether the provision of multiple labeled savings accounts affects savings and downstream outcomes in an experiment with 761 microentrepreneurs in urban Malawi. Treatment respondents received one or multiple savings accounts, in the form of lockboxes or mobile money. We find that while providing additional boxes increased savings by 40%, technical issues marred the efficacy of a second mobile money account. Both types of accounts had impacts on downstream outcomes, including farming decisions and credit extended to customers. We do not detect differential downstream effects by the number of accounts.
27035.zh_abstract: 我们在马拉维城市地区对761名微型企业家进行了一项实验，测试提供多个标记储蓄账户是否会影响储蓄和下游结果。处理组受访者获得一个或多个储蓄账户，形式为锁箱或移动货币。我们发现，虽然提供额外的锁箱使储蓄增加了40%，但技术问题损害了第二个移动货币账户的有效性。两种类型的账户都对下游结果产生了影响，包括农业决策和向客户提供的信贷。我们没有检测到账户数量对下游结果的差异化影响。

27034.title: Big G
27034.authors: Lydia Cox, Gernot Müller, Ernesto Pastén, Raphael Schoenle, Michael Weber
27034.abstract: Big G typically refers to aggregate government spending on a homogeneous good. In this paper, we open up this construct by analyzing the entire universe of procurement contracts of the US government and establish five facts. First, government spending is granular, that is, it is concentrated in relatively few firms and sectors. Second, relative to private expenditures its composition is biased. Third, procurement contracts are short-lived. Fourth, idiosyncratic variation dominates the fluctuation of spending. Last, government spending is concentrated in sectors with relatively sticky prices. Accounting for these facts within a stylized New Keynesian model offers new insights into the fiscal transmission mechanism: fiscal shocks hardly impact inflation, little crowding out of private expenditure exists, and the multiplier tends to be larger compared to a one-sector benchmark aligning the model with the empirical evidence.
27034.zh_abstract: 大G通常指政府在同质商品上的总支出。在本文中，我们通过分析美国政府所有采购合同的全貌来打开这一概念，并确立了五个事实。第一，政府支出是颗粒化的，即集中在相对较少的公司和行业。第二，相对于私人支出，其构成存在偏差。第三，采购合同是短期的。第四，特质性波动主导了支出的波动。最后，政府支出集中在价格相对粘性的行业。在一个标准的新凯恩斯主义模型中考虑这些事实，为财政传导机制提供了新的见解：财政冲击几乎不影响通胀，对私人支出的挤出很小，并且与使模型与经验证据一致的单部门基准相比，乘数往往更大。
27034.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME, PE, POL；JEL：E32, E62

27033.title: Beyond Reading, Writing, and Arithmetic: The Role of Teachers and Schools in Reporting Child Maltreatment
27033.zh_title: 超越阅读、写作和算术：教师和学校在报告儿童虐待中的作用
27033.authors: Maria D. Fitzpatrick, Cassandra Benson, Samuel R. Bondurant
27033.abstract: Nearly 4 in 10 children report experiencing maltreatment by adulthood. Early detection mitigates maltreatment’s negative effects. Yet factors that drive early detection remain understudied. We examine one possible source of early detection: educators in school settings. Administrative data on reports of child maltreatment across the U.S. over a 14-year period allows us to use two different regression discontinuity methods, one based on school-entry laws and one on school calendars. Both methods show education professionals are reporting cases that would have been missed otherwise. These findings suggest that improved training and support of educators may improve society's ability to help children and families.
27033.zh_abstract: 近十分之四的儿童报告在成年之前经历过虐待。早期发现可以减轻虐待的负面影响。然而，推动早期发现的因素仍未得到充分研究。我们考察了早期发现的一个可能来源：学校环境中的教育工作者。覆盖美国14年期间的儿童虐待报告行政数据使我们能够使用两种不同的断点回归方法，一种基于入学法律，另一种基于学校日历。两种方法都表明，教育专业人员正在报告那些原本会被遗漏的案件。这些发现表明，改善对教育工作者的培训和支持可能会提高社会帮助儿童和家庭的能力。

27032.title: Hometown Ties and the Quality of Government Monitoring: Evidence from Rotation of Chinese Auditors
27032.zh_title: 家乡情结与政府监管质量：来自中国审计师轮换的证据
27032.authors: Jian Chu, Raymond Fisman, Songtao Tan, Yongxiang Wang
27032.abstract: Audits are a standard mechanism for reducing corruption in government investments. The quality of audits themselves, however, may be affected by relationships between auditor and target. We study whether provincial chief auditors in China show greater leniency in evaluating prefecture governments in their hometowns. In city-fixed-effect specifications – in which the role of shared background is identified from auditor turnover – we show that hometown auditors find 38 percent less in questionable monies. This hometown effect is similar throughout the auditor’s tenure, and is diminished for audits ordered by the provincial Organizations Department as a result of the departure of top city officials. We argue that our findings are most readily explained by leniency toward local officials rather than an endogenous response to concerns of better enforcement by hometown auditors. We complement these city-level findings with firm-level analyses of earnings manipulation by state-owned enterprises via real activity manipulation (a standard measure from the accounting literature), which we show is higher under hometown auditors.
27032.zh_abstract: 审计是减少政府投资腐败的标准机制。然而，审计本身的质量可能受到审计师与审计对象之间关系的影响。我们研究了中国省级审计长在评估其家乡地级市政府时是否表现出更大的宽容。在城市固定效应设定中——通过审计师轮换识别共同背景的作用——我们表明，家乡审计师发现的可疑资金减少了38%。这种家乡效应在审计师的整个任期内相似，并且对于因市级主要官员离任而由省级组织部下令进行的审计，该效应会减弱。我们认为，我们的发现最容易用对地方官员的宽容来解释，而不是对家乡审计师执法更严格的担忧的内生反应。我们通过国有企业通过真实活动操纵（会计文献中的标准衡量指标）进行的盈余操纵的企业层面分析来补充这些城市层面的发现，我们表明在审计师为家乡人时，这种操纵更高。
27032.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, PE, POL；JEL：D73, G3, H83, M42

27031.title: Endogenous Education and Long-Run Factor Shares
27031.zh_title: 内生教育与长期要素份额
27031.authors: Gene M. Grossman, Elhanan Helpman, Ezra Oberfield, Thomas Sampson
27031.abstract: We study the determinants of factor shares in a neoclassical environment with capital- skill complementarity and endogenous education. When more physical capital raises the marginal product of skills relative to that of raw labor, an increase in a broad measure of embodied human capital raises the capital share in national income for any given rental rate. When education is chosen optimally, a dynamic equilibrium is characterized by an inverse relationship between the level of human capital and both the rental rate on capital and the difference between the interest rate and the growth rate of wages. As a consequence, estimates of the elasticity of substitution that fail to account for levels of human capital will be biased upward. We develop a model with overlapping generations, ongoing increases in educational attainment, and technology-driven neoclassical growth, and show that for a class of production functions with capital-skill complementarity, a balanced growth path exists and is characterized by an inverse relationship between the rates of capital- and labor-augmenting technological progress and the capital share in national income.
27031.zh_abstract: 我们在具有资本-技能互补性和内生教育的新古典环境中研究要素份额的决定因素。当更多的物质资本提高技能相对于原始劳动的边际产品时，广义体现型人力资本的增加会提高国民收入中的资本份额，无论租金率如何。当教育被最优选择时，动态均衡的特征是人力资本水平与资本租金率以及利率与工资增长率之差之间存在反向关系。因此，未能考虑人力资本水平的替代弹性估计将存在向上偏差。我们建立了一个具有代际重叠、教育程度持续提高和技术驱动的新古典增长的模型，并表明对于一类具有资本-技能互补性的生产函数，存在一条平衡增长路径，其特征是资本增进型和劳动增进型技术进步率与国民收入中的资本份额之间存在反向关系。

27030.title: Good-Bye Original Sin, Hello Risk On-Off, Financial Fragility, and Crises?
27030.zh_title: 告别原罪，迎来风险偏好切换、金融脆弱性与危机？
27030.authors: Joshua Aizenman, Yothin Jinjarak, Donghyun Park, Huanhuan Zheng
27030.abstract: We analyze the sovereign bond issuance data of eight major emerging markets (EMs) - Brazil, China, India, Indonesia, Mexico, Russia, South Africa and Turkey from 1970 to 2018. Our analysis suggests that (i) EM local currency bonds tend to be smaller in size, shorter in maturity, or lower in coupon rate than foreign currency bonds; (ii) EMs are more likely to issue local-currency sovereign bonds if their currencies appreciated before the global financial crisis of 2008 (GFC); (iii) inflation-targeting monetary policy increases the likelihood of issuing local-currency debt before GFC but not after; and (iv) EMs that offer higher sovereign yields are more likely to issue local-currency bonds after GFC. Future data will allow us to test and identify structural changes associated with the COVID-19 pandemic and its aftermath.
27030.zh_abstract: 我们分析了八个主要新兴市场——巴西、中国、印度、印度尼西亚、墨西哥、俄罗斯、南非和土耳其——从1970年到2018年的主权债券发行数据。我们的分析表明：（i）新兴市场本币债券往往比外币债券规模更小、期限更短或票面利率更低；（ii）如果新兴市场货币在2008年全球金融危机前升值，它们更有可能发行本币主权债券；（iii）通胀目标制货币政策在金融危机前增加了发行本币债务的可能性，但在金融危机后则不然；（iv）在金融危机后，提供更高主权收益率的新兴市场更有可能发行本币债券。未来的数据将使我们能够检验和识别与COVID-19大流行及其后果相关的结构性变化。

27029.title: Variation in Performance of Commonly Used Statistical Methods for Estimating Effectiveness of State-Level Opioid Policies on Opioid-Related Mortality
27029.zh_title: 常用统计方法在评估州级阿片类药物政策对阿片类药物相关死亡率有效性方面的表现差异
27029.authors: Beth Ann Griffin, Megan S. Schuler, Elizabeth A. Stuart, Stephen Patrick, Elizabeth McNeer, Rosanna Smart, David Powell, Bradley Stein, Terry Schell, Rosalie Liccardo Pacula
27029.abstract: Over the last two decades, there has been a surge of opioid-related overdose deaths resulting in a myriad of state policy responses. Researchers have evaluated the effectiveness of such policies using a wide-range of statistical models, each of which requires multiple design choices that can influence the accuracy and precision of the estimated policy effects. This simulation study used real-world data to compare model performance across a range of important statistical constructs to better understand which methods are appropriate for measuring the impacts of state-level opioid policies on opioid-related mortality. Our findings show that many commonly-used methods have very low statistical power to detect a significant policy effect (< 10%) when the policy effect size is small yet impactful (e.g., 5% reduction in opioid mortality). Many methods yielded high rates of Type I error, raising concerns of spurious conclusions about policy effectiveness. Finally, model performance was reduced when policy effectiveness had incremental, rather than instantaneous, onset. These findings highlight the limitations of existing statistical methods under scenarios that are likely to affect real-world policy studies. Given the necessity of identifying and implementing effective opioid-related policies, researchers and policymakers should be mindful of evaluation study statistical design.
27029.zh_abstract: 在过去二十年中，阿片类药物过量死亡人数激增，引发了各州一系列政策回应。研究人员使用各种统计模型评估了这些政策的有效性，每个模型都需要多种设计选择，这些选择会影响估计政策效应的准确性和精确度。本模拟研究使用真实世界数据，在一系列重要的统计结构上比较模型表现，以更好地了解哪些方法适用于衡量州级阿片类药物政策对阿片类药物相关死亡率的影响。我们的研究结果表明，当政策效应规模较小但影响重大（例如，阿片类药物死亡率降低5%）时，许多常用方法检测显著政策效应的统计功效非常低（<10%）。许多方法产生了高I类错误率，引发了对政策有效性得出虚假结论的担忧。最后，当政策有效性是渐进式而非即时式开始时，模型表现会降低。这些发现突显了在可能影响现实世界政策研究的情景下现有统计方法的局限性。鉴于识别和实施有效的阿片类药物相关政策的必要性，研究人员和政策制定者应注意评估研究的统计设计。
27029.meta: Programs：EH, PE；JEL：C1, C12, C15, C18, C22, C23, C4, C52, C54, H0, H51, H7, I18, I28, K32

27028.title: Estimating the Fraction of Unreported Infections in Epidemics with a Known Epicenter: an Application to COVID-19
27028.zh_title: 估计已知疫情中心流行病中未报告感染的比例：以COVID-19为例
27028.authors: Ali Hortaçsu, Jiarui Liu, Timothy Schwieg
27028.abstract: We develop an analytically tractable method to estimate the fraction of unreported infections in epidemics with a known epicenter and estimate the number of unreported COVID-19 infections in the US during the first half of March 2020. Our method utilizes the covariation in initial reported infections across US regions and the number of travelers to these regions from the epicenter, along with the results of an early randomized testing study in Iceland. Using our estimates of the number of unreported infections, which are substantially larger than the number of reported infections, we also provide estimates for the infection fatality rate using data on reported COVID-19 fatalities from U.S. counties.
27028.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种解析上易于处理的方法，用于估计已知疫情中心流行病中未报告感染的比例，并估算了2020年3月上半月美国未报告的COVID-19感染人数。我们的方法利用了美国各地区初始报告感染人数与来自疫情中心的旅行者数量之间的协变关系，以及冰岛早期随机检测研究的结果。利用我们对未报告感染人数的估计（这些估计值显著大于报告感染人数），我们还利用美国各县报告的COVID-19死亡数据，提供了感染致死率的估计值。

27027.title: Tracking Public and Private Responses to the COVID-19 Epidemic: Evidence from State and Local Government Actions
27027.zh_title: 追踪公共与私人对COVID-19疫情的应对：来自州及地方政府行动的证据
27027.authors: Sumedha Gupta, Thuy D. Nguyen, Felipe Lozano Rojas, Shyam Raman, Byungkyu Lee, Ana Bento, Kosali I. Simon, Coady Wing
27027.abstract: This paper examines the determinants of social distancing during the COVID-19 epidemic. We classify state and local government actions, and we study multiple proxies for social distancing based on data from smart devices. Mobility fell substantially in all states, even ones that have not adopted major distancing mandates. There is little evidence, for example, that stay-at-home mandates induced distancing. In contrast, early and information-focused actions have had bigger effects. Event studies show that first case announcements, emergency declarations, and school closures reduced mobility by 1-5% after 5 days and 7-45% after 20 days. Between March 1 and April 11, average time spent at home grew from 9.1 hours to 13.9 hours. We find, for example, that without state emergency declarations, event study estimates imply that hours at home would have been 11.3 hours in April, suggesting that 55% of the growth comes from emergency declarations and 45% comes from secular (non-policy) trends. State and local government actions induced changes in mobility on top of a large response across all states to the prevailing knowledge of public health risks. Early state policies conveyed information about the epidemic, suggesting that even the policy response mainly operates through a voluntary channel.
27027.zh_abstract: 本文考察了COVID-19疫情期间社会距离的决定因素。我们对州和地方政府的行动进行了分类，并基于智能设备数据研究了社会距离的多个代理指标。所有州的流动性都大幅下降，即使是那些未采取重大距离限制措施的州也是如此。例如，几乎没有证据表明居家令导致了距离行为。相比之下，早期和以信息为重点的行动产生了更大的影响。事件研究显示，首次病例公告、紧急状态声明和学校关闭在5天后使流动性降低了1-5%，在20天后降低了7-45%。从3月1日到4月11日，平均居家时间从9.1小时增加到13.9小时。例如，我们发现，如果没有州紧急状态声明，事件研究估计表明4月份的居家时间将为11.3小时，这表明55%的增长来自紧急状态声明，45%来自长期（非政策）趋势。在所有州对已知公共卫生风险做出大规模响应的基础上，州和地方政府的行动进一步引发了流动性的变化。早期的州政策传达了关于疫情的信息，这表明即使是政策响应也主要通过自愿渠道发挥作用。

27099.title: Health vs. Wealth? Public Health Policies and the Economy During Covid-19
27099.zh_title: 健康还是财富？COVID-19期间的公共卫生政策与经济
27099.abstract: We study the impact of non-pharmaceutical policy interventions (NPIs) like “stay-at-home” orders on the spread of infectious disease. Local policies have little impact on the economy nor on local public health. Stay-at-home is only weakly associated with slower growth of Covid-19 cases. Reductions in observed “mobility” are not associated with slower growth of Covid-19 cases. Stay-at-home is associated with lower workplace and more residential activity, but common shocks matter much more. Moreover, job losses have been no higher in US states that implemented stay-at-home during the Covid-19 pandemic than in states that did not have stay-at-home. All of these results demonstrate that the Covid-19 pandemic is a common economic and public health shock. They also show that policy spillovers and behavioral responses are important. The tradeoff between the economy and public health in a pandemic depends strongly on what is happening elsewhere. This underscores the importance of coordinated economic and public health responses.
27099.zh_abstract: 我们研究了非药物政策干预措施（如“居家令”）对传染病传播的影响。地方政策对经济或当地公共卫生几乎没有影响。居家令与COVID-19病例增长放缓之间仅存在微弱关联。观察到的“流动性”减少与COVID-19病例增长放缓无关。居家令与工作场所活动减少和住宅活动增加相关，但共同冲击的影响要大得多。此外，在COVID-19大流行期间实施居家令的美国各州，其失业率并不高于未实施居家令的州。所有这些结果表明，COVID-19大流行是一种共同的经济和公共卫生冲击。它们也表明，政策溢出效应和行为反应很重要。在大流行中，经济与公共卫生之间的权衡在很大程度上取决于其他地方的情况。这凸显了协调经济和公共卫生应对措施的重要性。

27098.title: Office Visits Preventing Emergency Room Visits: Evidence From the Flint Water Switch
27098.zh_title: 门诊就诊预防急诊就诊：来自弗林特水源切换的证据
27098.authors: Shooshan Danagoulian, Daniel S. Grossman, David Slusky
27098.abstract: Emergency department visits are costly to providers and to patients. We use the Flint water crisis to test if an increase in office visits reduced avoidable emergency room visits. In September 2015, the city of Flint issued a lead advisory to its residents, alerting them of increased lead levels in their drinking water, resulting from the switch in water source from Lake Huron to the Flint River. Using Medicaid claims for 2013-2016, we find that this information shock increased the share of enrollees who had lead tests performed by 1.7 percentage points. Additionally, it increased office visits immediately following the information shock and led to a reduction of 4.9 preventable, non-emergent, and primary-care-treatable emergency room visits per 1000 eligible children (8.2%). This decrease is present in shifts from emergency room visits to office visits across several common conditions. Our analysis suggest that children were more likely to receive care from the same clinic following lead tests and that establishing care reduced the likelihood parents would take their children to emergency rooms for conditions treatable in an office setting. Our results are potentially applicable to any situation in which individuals are induced to seek more care in an office visit setting.
27098.zh_abstract: 急诊就诊对医疗服务提供者和患者而言成本高昂。我们利用弗林特水危机来检验门诊就诊的增加是否减少了可避免的急诊就诊。2015年9月，弗林特市向其居民发布了铅警告，提醒他们饮用水中的铅含量升高，这是由于水源从休伦湖切换到弗林特河所致。利用2013-2016年的医疗补助索赔数据，我们发现这一信息冲击使接受铅检测的参保者比例增加了1.7个百分点。此外，信息冲击后门诊就诊立即增加，并导致每1000名符合条件的儿童中可预防、非紧急且初级保健可治疗的急诊就诊减少了4.9次（8.2%）。这种减少体现在几种常见疾病从急诊就诊向门诊就诊的转变中。我们的分析表明，儿童在铅检测后更有可能从同一诊所获得护理，而建立护理关系降低了家长因可在门诊治疗的疾病而带孩子去急诊的可能性。我们的结果可能适用于任何促使个人在门诊环境中寻求更多护理的情况。
27098.meta: Programs：CH, EEE, EH, PE；JEL：H75, I12, I18, J13, Q53, Q58

27097.title: Income, Liquidity, and the Consumption Response to the 2020 Economic Stimulus Payments
27097.zh_title: 收入、流动性与2020年经济刺激支付的消费反应
27097.authors: Scott R. Baker, R. A. Farrokhnia, Steffen Meyer, Michaela Pagel, Constantine Yannelis
27097.abstract: The 2020 CARES Act directed large cash payments to households. We analyze house-holds’ spending responses using high-frequency transaction data from a Fintech non-profit, exploring heterogeneity by income levels, recent income declines, and liquidity as well as linked survey responses about economic expectations. Households respond rapidly to the re-ceipt of stimulus payments, with spending increasing by $\$0.25$-$\$0.40$ per dollar of stimulus during the first weeks. Households with lower incomes, greater income drops, and lower lev-els of liquidity display stronger responses highlighting the importance of targeting. Liquidity plays the most important role, with no significant spending response for households with large checking account balances. Households that expect employment losses and benefit cuts dis-play weaker responses to the stimulus. Relative to the effects of previous economic stimulus programs in 2001 and 2008, we see faster effects, smaller increases in durables spending, larger increases in spending on food, and substantial increases in payments like rents, mortgages, and credit cards reflecting a short-term debt overhang. We formally show that these differences can make direct payments less effective in stimulating aggregate consumption.
27097.zh_abstract: 2020年《CARES法案》向家庭发放了大额现金支付。我们利用一家金融科技非营利组织的高频交易数据分析家庭的支出反应，探讨了按收入水平、近期收入下降和流动性划分的异质性，以及关于经济预期的关联调查回应。家庭在收到刺激支付后迅速做出反应，最初几周内每美元刺激支出增加0.25-0.40美元。收入较低、收入下降幅度较大和流动性水平较低的家庭表现出更强的反应，凸显了精准施策的重要性。流动性起着最重要的作用，对于支票账户余额较高的家庭，没有显著的支出反应。预期失业和福利削减的家庭对刺激的反应较弱。与2001年和2008年之前经济刺激计划的效果相比，我们看到效果更快，耐用品支出增长较小，食品支出增长较大，以及租金、抵押贷款和信用卡等支付大幅增加，反映了短期债务积压。我们正式表明，这些差异可能使直接支付在刺激总消费方面效果较差。
27097.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, EH, PE；JEL：D14, E21, G51

27096.title: Employer Policies and the Immigrant-Native Earnings Gap
27096.zh_title: 雇主政策与移民-本地人收入差距
27096.authors: Benoit Dostie, Jiang Li, David Card, Daniel Parent
27096.abstract: We use longitudinal data from the income tax system to study the impacts of firms’ employment and wage-setting policies on the level and change in immigrant-native wage differences in Canada. We focus on immigrants who arrived in the early 2000s, distinguishing between those with and without a college degree from two broad groups of countries – the U.S., the U.K. and Northern Europe, and the rest of the world. Consistent with a growing literature based on the two-way fixed effects model of Abowd, Kramarz, and Margolis (1999), we find that firm-specific wage premiums explain a significant share of earnings inequality in Canada and contribute to the average earnings gap between immigrants and natives. In the decade after receiving permanent status, earnings of immigrants rise relative to those of natives. Compositional effects due to selective outmigration and changing participation play no role in this gain. About one-sixth is attributable to movements up the job ladder to employers that offer higher pay premiums for all groups, with particularly large gains for immigrants from the “rest of the world” countries.
27096.zh_abstract: 我们利用所得税系统的纵向数据研究企业的就业和工资制定政策对加拿大移民与本地人工资差异水平和变化的影响。我们关注21世纪初抵达的移民，区分了来自两大国家群体（美国、英国和北欧，以及世界其他地区）的拥有和未拥有大学学位的移民。与基于Abowd、Kramarz和Margolis（1999）双向固定效应模型的日益增长的文献一致，我们发现企业特定的工资溢价解释了加拿大收入不平等的重要部分，并导致了移民与本地人之间的平均收入差距。在获得永久身份后的十年里，移民的收入相对于本地人有所上升。选择性向外迁移和参与率变化带来的构成效应在这一增长中没有作用。大约六分之一的增长归因于向提供更高工资溢价（对所有群体）的雇主晋升，其中来自“世界其他地区”国家的移民收益尤其大。

27095.title: Did the Paycheck Protection Program Hit the Target?
27095.zh_title: 薪资保护计划是否命中目标？
27095.authors: João Granja, Christos Makridis, Constantine Yannelis, Eric Zwick
27095.abstract: This paper provides a comprehensive assessment of financial intermediation and the economic effects of the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP), a large and novel small business support program that was part of the initial policy response to the COVID-19 pandemic in the US. We use loan-level microdata for all PPP loans and high-frequency administrative employment data to present three main findings. First, banks played an important role in mediating program targeting, which helps explain why some funds initially flowed to regions that were less adversely affected by the pandemic. Second, we exploit regional heterogeneity in lending relationships and individual firm-loan matched data to study the role of banks in explaining the employment effects of the PPP. We find the short- and medium-term employment effects of the program were small compared to the program’s size. Third, many firms used the loans to make non-payroll fixed payments and build up savings buffers, which can account for small employment effects and likely reflects precautionary motives in the face of heightened uncertainty. Limited targeting in terms of who was eligible likely also led to many inframarginal firms receiving funds and to a low correlation between regional PPP funding and shock severity. Our findings illustrate how business liquidity support programs affect firm behavior and local economic activity, and how policy trans-mission depends on the agents delegated to deploy it.
27095.zh_abstract: 本文对薪资保护计划（PPP）的金融中介和经济效应进行了全面评估，该计划是美国应对COVID-19大流行初期政策中一项大规模且新颖的小企业支持计划。我们利用所有PPP贷款的贷款级微观数据和高频行政就业数据，提出了三个主要发现。首先，银行在调节计划目标方面发挥了重要作用，这有助于解释为何部分资金最初流向了受大流行影响较小的地区。其次，我们利用借贷关系的区域异质性和个体企业-贷款匹配数据，研究银行在解释PPP就业效应中的作用。我们发现，与计划规模相比，该计划的短期和中期就业效应较小。第三，许多企业利用贷款进行非工资的固定支付并建立储蓄缓冲，这可以解释较小的就业效应，并可能反映了面对高度不确定性时的预防性动机。在资格方面的有限针对性也可能导致许多边际内企业获得资金，并导致区域PPP资金与冲击严重性之间的低相关性。我们的发现说明了企业流动性支持计划如何影响企业行为和当地经济活动，以及政策传导如何取决于被授权部署它的代理人。
27095.meta: Programs：CF, LS, ME, PE；JEL：E6, E62, G2, G21, G28, G38, H25, H32, H81, I38

27094.title: A New Method for Estimating Teacher Value-Added
27094.zh_title: 一种估计教师增值的新方法
27094.authors: Michael Gilraine, Jiaying Gu, Robert McMillan
27094.abstract: This paper proposes a new methodology for estimating teacher value-added. Rather than imposing a normality assumption on unobserved teacher quality (as in the standard empirical Bayes approach), our nonparametric estimator permits the underlying distribution to be estimated directly and in a computationally feasible way. The resulting estimates fit the unobserved distribution very well regardless of the form it takes, as we show in Monte Carlo simulations. Implementing the nonparametric approach in practice using two separate large-scale administrative data sets, we find the estimated teacher value-added distributions depart from normality and differ from each other. To draw out the policy implications of our method, we first consider a widely-discussed policy to release teachers at the bottom of the value-added distribution, comparing predicted test score gains under our nonparametric approach with those using parametric empirical Bayes. Here the parametric method predicts similar policy gains in one data set while overestimating those in the other by a substantial margin. We also show the predicted gains from teacher retention policies can be underestimated significantly based on the parametric method. In general, the results highlight the benefit of our nonparametric empirical Bayes approach, given that the unobserved distribution of value-added is likely to be context-specific.
27094.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种估计教师增值的新方法。我们的非参数估计量不假设未观测到的教师质量服从正态分布（如标准经验贝叶斯方法那样），而是允许直接以计算上可行的方式估计潜在分布。正如我们在蒙特卡洛模拟中所示，无论分布形式如何，由此产生的估计都能很好地拟合未观测到的分布。使用两个独立的大规模行政数据集实际应用非参数方法，我们发现估计的教师增值分布偏离正态分布，并且彼此不同。为了阐明我们方法的政策含义，我们首先考虑一项广泛讨论的政策——解雇增值分布底部的教师，比较了非参数方法与参数经验贝叶斯方法下预测的考试成绩增益。在这里，参数方法在一个数据集中预测了类似的政策增益，但在另一个数据集中则大幅高估了这些增益。我们还表明，基于参数方法，教师留任政策的预测增益可能被显著低估。总体而言，结果凸显了我们非参数经验贝叶斯方法的优势，因为未观测到的增值分布很可能是情境特定的。
27094.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE；JEL：C14, H75, I21, J24, J45

27093.title: Expected Profits and The Scientific Novelty of Innovation
27093.zh_title: 预期利润与创新的科学新颖性
27093.authors: David Dranove, Craig Garthwaite, Manuel I. Hermosilla
27093.abstract: Innovation policy involves trading off monopoly output and pricing in the short run in exchange for incentives for firms to develop new products in the future. While existing research demonstrates that expected profits fuel R&D investments, little is known about the novelty of the projects funded by these investments. Relying on data that describe the scientific approaches used by a large sample of experimental drug projects, we expand on this literature by examining the scientific novelty of pharmaceutical R&D investments following the creation of the Medicare Part D program. We find little evidence that the positive demand shock implied by this program prompted firms to undertake scientifically novel R&D activity, as measured by whether the specific scientific approach had been used before. However, we find some evidence that firms invested in products involving novel combinations of scientific approaches. These estimates can inform economists and policymakers assessing the tradeoffs associated with marginal changes in commercial returns from newly developed pharmaceutical products.
27093.zh_abstract: 创新政策涉及在短期内权衡垄断产出和定价，以换取激励企业未来开发新产品的动力。虽然现有研究表明预期利润推动了研发投资，但对于这些投资资助的项目的新颖性知之甚少。利用描述大量实验性药物项目所使用科学方法的数据，我们通过考察医疗保险D部分计划创建后制药研发投资的科学新颖性，扩展了这一文献。我们发现，几乎没有证据表明该计划带来的正向需求冲击促使企业从事科学新颖的研发活动，这是根据特定科学方法是否曾被使用来衡量的。然而，我们确实发现一些证据表明，企业投资于涉及科学方法新颖组合的产品。这些估计可以为评估新开发药品商业回报边际变化相关权衡的经济学家和政策制定者提供信息。

27092.title: Measuring the Perceived Liquidity of the Corporate Bond Market
27092.zh_title: 衡量公司债券市场的感知流动性
27092.abstract: We propose a novel measure of bond market liquidity that does not depend on transaction data: the strength of the cross-sectional relationship between mutual fund cash holdings and fund flow volatility. Our measure captures how liquid funds perceive their portfolio holdings to be at a given point in time. The perceived liquidity of speculative grade and Rule 144A bonds is significantly lower than investment grade bonds in the cross section and deteriorated significantly following the 2008-9 financial crisis. Our measure can be applied in settings where either transaction data are not available or transactions are rare, including the markets for asset-backed securities, syndicated loans, and municipal bonds.
27092.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种不依赖交易数据的债券市场流动性新衡量指标：共同基金现金持有量与基金流量波动性之间的横截面关系强度。我们的指标捕捉了基金在特定时间点对其投资组合持有量的感知流动性。在横截面上，投机级和144A规则债券的感知流动性显著低于投资级债券，并在2008-9年金融危机后显著恶化。我们的指标可应用于交易数据不可用或交易稀少的环境，包括资产支持证券、银团贷款和市政债券市场。

27091.title: When Do Shelter-in-Place Orders Fight COVID-19 Best? Policy Heterogeneity Across States and Adoption Time
27091.zh_title: 居家令何时能最好地抗击COVID-19？各州政策异质性与采纳时间
27091.authors: Dhaval M. Dave, Andrew I. Friedson, Kyutaro Matsuzawa, Joseph J. Sabia
27091.abstract: Shelter in place orders (SIPOs) require residents to remain home for all but essential activities such as purchasing food or medicine, caring for others, exercise, or traveling for employment deemed essential. Between March 19 and April 20, 2020, 40 states and the District of Columbia adopted SIPOs. This study explores the impact of SIPOs on health, with particular attention to heterogeneity in their impacts. First, using daily state-level social distancing data from SafeGraph and a difference-in-differences approach, we document that adoption of a SIPO was associated with a 5 to 10 percent increase in the rate at which state residents remained in their homes full-time. Then, using daily state-level coronavirus case data collected by the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention, we find that approximately three weeks following the adoption of a SIPO, cumulative COVID-19 cases fell by 44 percent. Event-study analyses confirm common COVID-19 case trends in the week prior to SIPO adoption and show that SIPO-induced case reductions grew larger over time. However, this average effect masks important heterogeneity across states — early adopters and high population density states appear to reap larger benefits from their SIPOs. Finally, we find that statewide SIPOs were associated with a reduction in coronavirus-related deaths, but estimated mortality effects were imprecisely estimated.
27091.zh_abstract: 居家令要求居民除购买食品或药品、照顾他人、锻炼或从事被视为必要的就业等基本活动外，留在家中。2020年3月19日至4月20日期间，40个州和哥伦比亚特区采纳了居家令。本研究探讨了居家令对健康的影响，特别关注其影响的异质性。首先，利用SafeGraph的每日州级社交距离数据和双重差分方法，我们记录了采纳居家令与州居民全天候留在家中比例增加5%至10%相关。然后，利用疾病控制与预防中心收集的每日州级冠状病毒病例数据，我们发现采纳居家令约三周后，累计COVID-19病例下降了44%。事件研究分析证实了在采纳居家令前一周COVID-19病例趋势相似，并显示居家令导致的病例减少随时间推移而增大。然而，这一平均效应掩盖了各州之间的重要异质性——早期采纳者和人口密度高的州似乎从其居家令中获益更大。最后，我们发现全州范围的居家令与冠状病毒相关死亡减少相关，但估计的死亡率效应并不精确。
27091.meta: Programs：AG, CH, DEV, EH, LE, PE；JEL：H75, I18

27090.title: Dropouts Need Not Apply? The Minimum Wage and Skill Upgrading
27090.zh_title: 辍学者不予录用？最低工资与技能升级
27090.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Lisa B. Kahn, Jonathan Meer
27090.abstract: We explore whether minimum wage increases result in substitution from lower-skilled to slightly higher-skilled labor. Using 2011-2016 American Community Survey data (ACS), we show that workers employed in low-wage occupations are older and more likely to have a high school diploma following recent statutory minimum wage increases. To better understand the role of firms, we examine the Burning Glass vacancy data. We find increases in a high school diploma requirement following minimum wage hikes, consistent with our ACS evidence on stocks of employed workers. We see substantial adjustments to requirements both within and across firms.
27090.zh_abstract: 我们探讨最低工资上涨是否会导致从低技能劳动力向略高技能劳动力的替代。利用2011-2016年美国社区调查数据，我们发现在近期法定最低工资上调后，低工资职业的从业者年龄更大，且更可能拥有高中文凭。为了更好地理解企业的作用，我们分析了Burning Glass职位空缺数据。我们发现最低工资上调后，高中文凭要求有所提高，这与我们对在职员工存量的ACS证据一致。我们观察到企业内部和企业之间对任职要求进行了大幅调整。

27089.title: Do Differences in School Quality Generate Heterogeneity in the Causal Returns to Education?
27089.zh_title: 学校质量差异是否会导致教育因果回报的异质性？
27089.abstract: Estimating the returns to education remains an active area of research amongst applied economists. Most studies that estimate the causal return to education exploit changes in schooling and/or labor laws to generate exogenous differences in education. An implicit assumption is that more time in school may translate into greater earnings potential. None of these studies, however, explicitly consider the quality of schooling to which impacted students are exposed. To extend this literature, we examine the interaction between school quality and policy-induced returns to schooling, using temporally-available school quality measures from Card and Krueger (1992). We find that additional compulsory schooling, via either schooling or labor laws, increases earnings only if educational inputs are of sufficiently high quality. In particular, we find a consistent role for teacher quality, as measured by relative teacher pay across states, in generating consistently positive returns to compulsory schooling.
27089.zh_abstract: 估算教育回报率仍是应用经济学家活跃的研究领域。大多数估算教育因果回报的研究利用学校法和/或劳动法的变化来产生教育的外生差异。一个隐含的假设是，更多的在校时间可能会转化为更高的收入潜力。然而，这些研究都没有明确考虑受影响学生所接受的学校教育质量。为了扩展这一文献，我们利用Card和Krueger（1992）中按时间可得的学校质量指标，考察了学校质量与政策诱导的教育回报之间的相互作用。我们发现，只有当教育投入质量足够高时，额外的义务教育（通过学校法或劳动法）才能提高收入。具体而言，我们发现教师质量（以各州相对教师薪酬衡量）在产生持续正向的义务教育回报方面具有一致的作用。

27088.title: Dissecting Mechanisms of Financial Crises: Intermediation and Sentiment
27088.zh_title: 解析金融危机的机制：中介与情绪
27088.abstract: We develop a model of financial crises with both a financial amplification mechanism, via frictional intermediation, and a role for sentiment, via time-varying beliefs about an illiquidity state. The model accounts for the entire crisis cycle, matching data on the frothy pre-crisis behavior of asset markets and credit, the sharp transition to a crisis where asset values fall, disintermediation occurs and output falls, and the slow post-crisis recovery in output. Both the intermediation and belief mechanism are essential to match the crisis cycle. However, modeling the belief variation via either a Bayesian or diagnostic model can match the broad patterns.
27088.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个金融危机模型，该模型既包含通过摩擦性中介实现的金融放大机制，也包含通过关于非流动性状态时变信念的情绪作用。该模型解释了整个危机周期，与资产市场和信贷在危机前的泡沫行为、资产价值下跌、去中介化和产出下降的危机急剧转变，以及危机后产出的缓慢复苏等数据相匹配。中介机制和信念机制对于匹配危机周期都至关重要。然而，通过贝叶斯模型或诊断模型对信念变化进行建模，都可以匹配总体模式。

27087.title: Personalized Pricing and the Value of Time: Evidence from Auctioned Cab Rides
27087.zh_title: 个性化定价与时间价值：来自拍卖网约车行程的证据
27087.authors: Nicholas Buchholz, Laura Doval, Jakub Kastl, Filip Matějka, Tobias Salz
27087.abstract: We recover valuations of time using detailed data from a large ride-hail platform, where drivers bid on trips and consumers choose between a set of rides with different prices and wait times. Leveraging a consumer panel, we estimate demand as a function of both prices and wait times and use the resulting estimates to recover heterogeneity in the value of time across consumers. We study the welfare implications of personalized pricing and its effect on the platform, drivers, and consumers. Taking into account drivers’ optimal reaction to the platform’s pricing policy, personalized pricing lowers consumer surplus by 2.5% and increases overall surplus by 5.2%. Like the platform, drivers benefit from personalized pricing. ETA-based pricing– where different prices are set for various wait times and where extensive use of consumer data is not required–can capture a significant portion of the profits garnered from personalized pricing, while simultaneously benefiting consumers.
27087.zh_abstract: 我们利用来自大型网约车平台的详细数据恢复了时间估值，在该平台上，司机对行程进行竞标，消费者在具有不同价格和等待时间的一组行程中进行选择。利用消费者面板数据，我们估计了作为价格和等待时间函数的需求，并利用所得估计值恢复了消费者之间时间价值的异质性。我们研究了个性化定价的福利影响及其对平台、司机和消费者的效应。考虑到司机对平台定价策略的最优反应，个性化定价使消费者剩余降低2.5%，使总剩余增加5.2%。与平台一样，司机也从个性化定价中受益。基于ETA的定价——即为不同的等待时间设定不同的价格，且无需大量使用消费者数据——可以捕获个性化定价所获利润的很大一部分，同时使消费者受益。

27086.title: Ambiguous Pollution Response to COVID-19 in China
27086.zh_title: 中国COVID-19污染响应的模糊性
27086.authors: Douglas Almond, Xinming Du, Shuang Zhang
27086.abstract: Reductions in ambient pollution have been taken as an indisputable "silver lining" to the COVID-19 Pandemic. Indeed, worldwide economic contraction induced by COVID-19 lockdowns should generate global air quality improvements ceteris paribus, including to China's notoriously-poor air quality. We analyze China's official pollution monitor data and account for the large, recurrent improvement in air quality following Lunar New Year (LNY), which essentially coincided with lock-downs in 2020. With the important exception of NO2, China's air quality improvements in 2020 are smaller than we should expect near the pandemic's epicenter: Hubei province. Compared with LNY improvements experienced in 2018 and 2019 in Hubei, we see smaller improvements in SO2 while ozone concentrations increased in both relative and absolute terms (roughly doubling). Similar patterns are found for the six provinces neighboring Hubei. We conclude that COVID-19 had ambiguous impacts on China's pollution, with evidence of relative deterioration in air quality near the Pandemic's epicenter.
27086.zh_abstract: 环境污染物减少被视为COVID-19大流行一个无可争议的“一线希望”。确实，COVID-19封锁导致的世界经济收缩，在其他条件不变的情况下，应会带来全球空气质量改善，包括中国臭名昭著的恶劣空气质量。我们分析了中国的官方污染监测数据，并考虑了农历新年后空气质量的显著、周期性改善，而2020年的农历新年基本上与封锁同时发生。除了NO2这一重要例外，2020年中国空气质量的改善幅度小于我们在疫情中心——湖北省——附近的预期。与2018年和2019年湖北省农历新年期间的改善相比，我们看到SO2的改善幅度较小，而臭氧浓度在相对和绝对意义上均有所增加（大约翻倍）。在湖北省周边的六个省份也发现了类似模式。我们得出结论，COVID-19对中国污染的影响是模糊的，有证据表明疫情中心附近的空气质量相对恶化。

27085.title: Which Workers Bear the Burden of Social Distancing?
27085.zh_title: 哪些工人承担了社交距离的负担？
27085.authors: Simon Mongey, Laura Pilossoph, Alex Weinberg
27085.abstract: Using data from O∗NET, we construct two measures of an occupation’s potential exposure to social distancing measures: (i) the ability to conduct that job from home and (ii) the degree of physical proximity to others the job requires. After validating these measures with comparable measures from ATUS as well as realized work-from-home rates during the pandemic, we employ the measures to study the characteristics of workers in these types of jobs. Our results show that workers in low-work-from-home and high-physical-proximity jobs are more economically vulnerable across various measures constructed from the CPS and PSID: they are less educated, of lower income, have fewer liquid assets relative to income, and are more likely renters. Consistent with the idea that high physical proximity or low work-from-home occupations were more exposed to the Coronavirus shock, we show that the types of workers predicted to be employed in them experienced greater declines in employment during the pandemic. We conclude by comparing the aggregate employment losses in these occupations to their employment losses in the 2008 recession, and ﬁnd evidence that these occupations were disproportionately exposed to the pandemic shock, and not just comprised of more cyclically sensitive workers.
27085.zh_abstract: 利用O*NET的数据，我们构建了衡量职业在社交距离措施下潜在暴露程度的两项指标：（i）在家完成该工作的能力，以及（ii）该工作所需与他人身体接近的程度。在用美国时间使用调查的可比指标以及大流行期间实现的居家工作率验证这些指标后，我们利用这些指标来研究从事这些类型工作的工人的特征。我们的结果表明，根据当前人口调查和收入动态面板研究构建的各种指标，低居家工作率和高身体接近度工作的工人在经济上更脆弱：他们受教育程度较低、收入较低、流动资产相对于收入较少，并且更可能是租房者。与高身体接近度或低居家工作率的职业更容易受到冠状病毒冲击的观点一致，我们表明，预计从事这些职业的工人在大流行期间经历了更大的就业下降。最后，我们将这些职业的总就业损失与2008年衰退期间的就业损失进行比较，发现证据表明这些职业不成比例地暴露于大流行冲击，而不仅仅是包含更多周期性敏感的工人。

27084.title: Interest Rate Uncertainty as a Policy Tool
27084.zh_title: 利率不确定性作为政策工具
27084.abstract: We study an unconventional policy tool–interest rate uncertainty–that may be used to discourage inefficient capital inflows and to adjust the composition of external accounts between short-term securities and foreign direct investment (FDI). Identified interest rate volatility shocks in several emerging markets cause a decline in GDP growth, increase in inflation, an improvement in the current account, and a depreciation in real exchange rate. Using a calibrated open-economy New Keynesian model, we introduce an interest rate uncertainty policy rule that adjusts the volatility of emerging market economy interest rate shocks in response to drivers of capital flows. The uncertainty policy discourages short-term inflows through portfolio risk and consumption smoothing channels. A markup channel combined with exchange rate depreciation generates FDI inflows. The transmission of uncertainty via markups is influenced by the extent of exchange rate pass-through. The uncertainty policy may be welfare improving if designed against uncertainty shocks that drive capital flows. However, it may be welfare reducing against level shocks that drive capital inflows. We further investigate new channels under different scenarios, including various assumptions about currency of export invoicing, varying degrees of risk aversion, interaction with different types of Taylor rules, and effective-lower-bound in the rest of the world.
27084.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一种非常规政策工具——利率不确定性——它可用于阻止低效的资本流入，并调整外部账户在短期证券和外国直接投资之间的构成。在几个新兴市场中，已识别的利率波动冲击导致GDP增长下降、通胀上升、经常账户改善以及实际汇率贬值。利用校准后的开放经济新凯恩斯模型，我们引入了一项利率不确定性政策规则，该规则根据资本流动驱动因素调整新兴市场经济体利率冲击的波动性。不确定性政策通过投资组合风险和消费平滑渠道阻止短期流入。加价渠道与汇率贬值相结合，产生了外国直接投资流入。通过加价传导不确定性的程度受到汇率传递程度的影响。如果针对驱动资本流动的不确定性冲击进行设计，不确定性政策可能改善福利。然而，针对驱动资本流入的水平冲击，它可能降低福利。我们进一步研究了不同情景下的新渠道，包括关于出口计价货币的各种假设、不同程度的风险厌恶、与不同类型泰勒规则的相互作用，以及世界其他地区的有效下限。
27084.meta: Programs：IFM, ME；JEL：E32, F21, F32, F38, G15

27083.title: Steering Incentives of Platforms: Evidence from the Telecommunications Industry
27083.zh_title: 平台的引导激励：来自电信行业的证据
27083.authors: Brian McManus, Aviv Nevo, Zachary Nolan, Jonathan W. Williams
27083.abstract: We study the trade-offs faced by Internet Service Providers (ISPs) that serve as platforms through which consumers access both television and internet services. As online streaming video improves, these providers may respond by attempting to steer consumers away from streaming video toward their own TV services, or by attempting to capture surplus from this improved internet content. We augment the standard mixed bundling model to demonstrate the trade-offs the ISP faces when dealing with streaming video, and we show how these trade-offs change with the pricing options available to the ISP. Next, we use unique household-level panel data and the introduction of usage-based pricing (UBP) in a subset of markets to measure consumers' responses and to evaluate quantitatively the ISP's trade-offs. We find that the introduction of UBP led consumers to upgrade their internet service plans and lower overall internet usage. Our findings suggest that while steering consumers towards TV services is possible, it is likely costly for the ISP and therefore unlikely to be profitable. This is especially true if the ISP can offer rich pricing menus that allow it to capture some of the surplus generated by a better internet service. The results suggest that policies like UBP can increase ISPs' incentive to maintain open access to new internet content.
27083.zh_abstract: 我们研究了互联网服务提供商所面临的权衡，这些提供商是消费者访问电视和互联网服务的平台。随着在线流媒体视频的改进，这些提供商可能会通过尝试引导消费者远离流媒体视频转向其自有电视服务，或通过尝试从改进的互联网内容中获取剩余价值来做出反应。我们扩展了标准的混合捆绑模型，以展示互联网服务提供商在处理流媒体视频时所面临的权衡，并展示了这些权衡如何随着互联网服务提供商可用的定价选项而变化。接下来，我们利用独特的家庭层面面板数据以及部分市场引入基于使用量的定价，来衡量消费者的反应并定量评估互联网服务提供商的权衡。我们发现，基于使用量的定价的引入导致消费者升级其互联网服务计划并降低整体互联网使用量。我们的研究结果表明，虽然引导消费者转向电视服务是可能的，但这对于互联网服务提供商来说可能成本高昂，因此不太可能盈利。特别是如果互联网服务提供商能够提供丰富的定价菜单，使其能够捕获由更好的互联网服务产生的部分剩余价值，情况更是如此。结果表明，像基于使用量的定价这样的政策可以增加互联网服务提供商维持对新互联网内容开放接入的激励。

27082.title: Global Behaviors and Perceptions at the Onset of the COVID-19 Pandemic
27082.zh_title: COVID-19大流行初期的全球行为与认知
27082.authors: Thiemo R. Fetzer, Marc Witte, Lukas Hensel, Jon Jachimowicz, Johannes Haushofer, Andriy Ivchenko, Stefano Caria, Elena Reutskaja, Christopher P. Roth, Stefano Fiorin, Margarita Gómez, Gordon Kraft-Todd, Friedrich M. Götz, Erez Yoeli
27082.abstract: We conducted a large-scale survey covering 58 countries and over 100,000 respondents between late March and early April 2020 to study beliefs and attitudes towards citizens’ and governments’ responses to the COVID-19 pandemic. Most respondents reacted strongly to the crisis: they report engaging in social distancing and hygiene behaviors, and believe that strong policy measures, such as shop closures and curfews, are necessary. They also believe that their government and their country’s citizens are not doing enough and underestimate the degree to which others in their country support strong behavioral and policy responses to the pandemic. The perception of a weak government and public response is associated with higher levels of worries and depression. Using both cross-country panel data and an event-study, we additionally show that strong government reactions correct misperceptions, and reduce worries and depression. Our findings highlight that policy-makers not only need to consider how their decisions affect the spread of COVID-19, but also how such choices influence the mental health of their population.
27082.zh_abstract: 我们在2020年3月底至4月初进行了一项大规模调查，覆盖58个国家、超过10万名受访者，旨在研究公民与政府对COVID-19大流行反应的信念与态度。大多数受访者对危机反应强烈：他们报告采取了社交疏离和卫生行为，并认为关闭商店和宵禁等强力政策措施是必要的。他们还认为本国政府和公民做得不够，并低估了本国其他人对强力行为和政策应对大流行的支持程度。对政府与公众反应薄弱的认知与更高程度的担忧和抑郁相关。利用跨国面板数据和事件研究法，我们进一步表明，强有力的政府反应能够纠正错误认知，并减少担忧和抑郁。我们的发现强调，政策制定者不仅需要考虑其决策如何影响COVID-19的传播，还需考虑这些选择如何影响民众的心理健康。
27082.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, PE, POL；JEL：I12, I31, I38

27081.title: Electricity and Firm Productivity: A General-Equilibrium Approach
27081.zh_title: 电力与企业生产率：一般均衡方法
27081.abstract: The lack of reliable electricity in the developing world is widely viewed by policymakers as a major constraint on firm productivity. Yet most empirical studies find modest short-run effects of power outages on firm performance. This paper builds a dynamic macroeconomic model to study the long-run general equilibrium effects of power outages on productivity. The model captures the key features of how firms acquire electricity in the developing world, in particular the rationing of grid electricity and the possibility of self-generated electricity at higher cost. Power outages lower productivity in the model by creating idle resources, by depressing the scale of incumbent firms and by reducing entry of new firms. Consistent with the empirical literature, the model predicts that the short-run partial-equilibrium effects of eliminating outages are small. However, the long-run general-equilibrium effects are many times larger, supporting the view that eliminating outages is an important development objective.
27081.zh_abstract: 发展中国家电力供应不可靠被政策制定者广泛视为企业生产率的主要制约因素。然而，大多数实证研究发现停电对企业绩效的短期影响较小。本文构建了一个动态宏观经济模型，研究停电对生产率的长期一般均衡效应。该模型捕捉了发展中国家企业获取电力的关键特征，特别是电网电力的配给以及以更高成本自行发电的可能性。模型中，停电通过造成资源闲置、抑制现有企业规模以及减少新企业进入来降低生产率。与实证文献一致，该模型预测消除停电的短期局部均衡效应较小。然而，长期一般均衡效应要大得多，这支持了消除停电是一项重要发展目标的观点。
27081.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, EFG；JEL：E13, E23, O11, O41, Q43

27080.title: Economics of Research and Innovation in Agriculture
27080.zh_title: 农业研究与创新的经济学
27080.abstract: Feeding the world’s growing population is one of the most critical policy challenges for the 21st century. With tightening constraints on water, arable land, and other natural resources, agricultural innovation is quickly becoming the most promising path meet the nutrient needs for future generations. At the same time, the increasing variability in the world’s climate intensifies the need for developing new crops that can tolerate extreme weather. Despite the urgency of this task, there is an active discussion on the returns to public and private spending in agricultural R&D, and many of the world’s wealthier countries have scaled back their share of GDP devoted to agricultural R&D. Dwindling public support leaves universities, which, historically, have been a major source of agricultural innovation, increasingly dependent on funding from industry, with uncertain effects on agricultural research. All of these factors create an urgent need for systematic empirical evidence on the forces that drive research and innovation in agriculture. This book aims to provides such evidence through economic analyses of the sources of agricultural innovation, the challenges of measuring productivity, the role of universities and their interactions with industry, and emerging mechanisms to fund agricultural R&D.
27080.zh_abstract: 养活全球不断增长的人口是21世纪最关键的政策挑战之一。随着水资源、可耕地和其他自然资源的约束日益收紧，农业创新正迅速成为满足未来几代人营养需求的最有希望的途径。与此同时，全球气候日益多变，加剧了开发能够耐受极端天气的新作物的需求。尽管这项任务紧迫，但关于公共和私人农业研发支出回报的讨论十分活跃，许多较富裕国家已削减了农业研发支出占GDP的比重。公共支持的减少使大学——历史上一直是农业创新的主要来源——越来越依赖行业资助，这对农业研究产生了不确定的影响。所有这些因素都迫切需要系统性的实证证据，以揭示推动农业研究与创新的力量。本书旨在通过经济分析提供此类证据，涵盖农业创新的来源、衡量生产率的挑战、大学的作用及其与行业的互动，以及资助农业研发的新兴机制。
27080.meta: Programs：DAE, PR；JEL：N5, O3, O32, O33, Q16, Q18, Q24, Q25, Q54, Q55

27079.title: Incentivizing Behavioral Change: The Role of Time Preferences
27079.zh_title: 激励行为改变：时间偏好的作用
27079.authors: Shilpa Aggarwal, Rebecca Dizon-Ross, Ariel D. Zucker
27079.abstract: How should the design of incentives vary with agent time preferences? We develop two predictions. First, “bundling” the payment function over time – specifically by making the payment for future effort increase in current effort – is more effective if individuals are impatient over effort. Second, increasing the frequency of payment is more effective if individuals are impatient over payment. We test the efficacy of time-bundling and payment frequency, and their interactions with impatience, using a randomized evaluation of an incentive program for exercise among diabetics in India. Consistent with our theoretical predictions, bundling payments over time meaningfully increases effort among the impatient relative to the patient. In contrast, increasing payment frequency has limited efficacy, suggesting limited impatience over payments. On average, incentives increase daily steps by 1,266 (13 minutes of brisk walking) and improve health.
27079.zh_abstract: 激励设计应如何随代理人时间偏好而变化？我们提出两个预测。首先，如果个体对努力缺乏耐心，那么将支付函数在时间上“捆绑”——特别是使未来努力的支付随当前努力增加而增加——会更有效。其次，如果个体对支付缺乏耐心，那么增加支付频率会更有效。我们利用印度糖尿病患者运动激励计划的随机评估，检验了时间捆绑和支付频率及其与缺乏耐心的交互作用的有效性。与我们的理论预测一致，相对于有耐心的个体，时间捆绑支付显著增加了缺乏耐心个体的努力。相比之下，增加支付频率效果有限，表明对支付缺乏耐心的情况有限。平均而言，激励措施使每日步数增加了1266步（相当于13分钟快走），并改善了健康状况。
27079.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, LS, PE；JEL：D9, I12, I15

27078.title: Is the Supply of Charitable Donations Fixed? Evidence from Deadly Tornadoes
27078.zh_title: 慈善捐赠的供给是固定的吗？来自致命龙卷风的证据
27078.abstract: Do new societal needs increase charitable giving or simply reallocate a fixed supply of donations? We study this question using IRS datasets and the natural experiment of deadly tornadoes. Among ZIP Codes located more than 20 miles away from a tornado's path, donations by households increase by over $\$1$ million per tornado fatality. We find no negative effects on charities located in these ZIP Codes, with a bootstrapped confidence interval that rejects substitution rates above 16 percent. The results imply that giving to one cause need not come at the expense of another.
27078.zh_abstract: 新的社会需求是增加了慈善捐赠，还是仅仅重新分配了固定的捐赠供给？我们利用国税局数据集和致命龙卷风的自然实验来研究这一问题。在距离龙卷风路径超过20英里的邮政编码区，每起龙卷风死亡事件使家庭捐赠增加超过100万美元。我们未发现对这些邮政编码区内的慈善机构有负面影响，自助法置信区间拒绝了超过16%的替代率。结果表明，对某一事业的捐赠未必以牺牲另一事业为代价。

27077.title: Trade Credit and the Transmission of Unconventional Monetary Policy
27077.zh_title: 商业信用与非常规货币政策的传导
27077.authors: Manuel Adelino, Miguel A. Ferreira, Mariassunta Giannetti, Pedro Pires
27077.abstract: We show that trade credit in production networks is important for the transmission of unconventional monetary policy. We find that firms with bonds eligible for purchase under the European Central Bank’s Corporate Sector Purchase Program act as financial intermediaries and extend more trade credit to their customers. The increase in trade credit flows is more pronounced from core countries to periphery countries and towards financially constrained customers. Customers increase investment and employment in response to the additional financing, while suppliers with eligible bonds increase their customer base, potentially favoring upstream industry concentration. Our findings suggest that the trade credit channel of monetary policy produces heterogeneous effects on regions, industries, and firms.
27077.zh_abstract: 我们表明，生产网络中的商业信用对非常规货币政策的传导至关重要。我们发现，其债券符合欧洲央行企业部门购买计划购买条件的公司充当金融中介，并向其客户提供更多商业信用。商业信用流量的增加在核心国家向边缘国家以及向财务受限的客户中更为显著。客户利用额外融资增加投资和就业，而拥有合格债券的供应商则扩大了客户基础，这可能有利于上游行业集中。我们的发现表明，货币政策的商业信用渠道对地区、行业和企业产生异质性影响。

27076.title: Generosity Across the Income and Wealth Distributions
27076.zh_title: 收入与财富分布中的慷慨程度
27076.abstract: Despite widespread interest, there is little systematic evidence on the relationship between income, wealth, and charitable giving. We use the Panel Study of Income Dynamics to provide descriptive statistics on this relationship. We find that, irrespective of specifica­tion, donative behavior increases with greater resources.
27076.zh_abstract: 尽管人们普遍关注，但关于收入、财富与慈善捐赠之间关系的系统性证据很少。我们利用收入动态面板研究提供了这一关系的描述性统计。我们发现，无论采用何种设定，捐赠行为都随资源增加而增加。

27075.title: Immigration, Innovation, and Growth
27075.authors: Konrad B. Burchardi, Thomas Chaney, Tarek Alexander Hassan, Lisa Tarquinio, Stephen J. Terry
27075.abstract: We show a causal impact of immigration on innovation and growth in US counties. To identify the causal impact of immigration, we use 130 years of detailed data on migrations from foreign countries to US counties to isolate quasi-random variation in the ancestry composition of US counties; interacting this plausibly exogenous variation in ancestry composition with the recent inflows of migrants from different origins, we predict the total number of migrants flowing into each US county in recent decades. We show immigration has a positive causal impact on innovation, measured as patenting of local firms, and on economic growth, measured as real income growth for native workers. We interpret those results through the lens of a quantitative model of endogenous growth and migrations. A structural estimation of this model targeting the well identified causal impact of migration on innovation suggests the large inflow of foreign migrants into the US since 1965 may have contributed to an additional 8% growth in innovation and 5% growth in wages.
27075.zh_abstract: 我们展示了移民对美国各县创新与增长的因果影响。为识别移民的因果影响，我们利用130年来从外国到美国各县的详细迁移数据，以分离美国各县祖先构成的准随机变异；将这种看似外生的祖先构成变异与近期来自不同原籍地的移民流入交互作用，我们预测了最近几十年流入每个美国县的移民总数。我们发现，移民对创新（以当地企业的专利衡量）和经济增长（以本地工人的实际收入增长衡量）具有正向因果影响。我们通过一个内生增长与迁移的定量模型来解读这些结果。针对已识别的移民对创新的因果影响进行该模型的结构估计表明，自1965年以来大量外国移民流入美国可能贡献了额外的8%创新增长和5%工资增长。
27075.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, IFM, POL, PR；JEL：J61, O31, O40

27074.title: Optimal Bailouts and the Doom Loop with a Financial Network
27074.zh_title: 最优救助与金融网络中的“厄运循环”
27074.authors: Agostino Capponi, Felix C. Corell, Joseph E. Stiglitz
27074.abstract: Banks usually hold large amounts of domestic debt which makes them vulnerable to their own sovereign's default risk. At the same time, governments often resort to costly bailouts when their banking sector is in trouble. We investigate how the network structure and the distribution of ownership of sovereign debt within the banking sector jointly affect the optimal bailout policy under this “doom loop”. We argue that rescuing banks with high domestic sovereign exposure is optimal if these banks are sufficiently central, even though that requires larger bailout expenditures than rescuing otherwise identical low-exposure banks. Our model illustrates how the “doom loop” exacerbates the “too interconnected to fail” problem.
27074.zh_abstract: 银行通常持有大量国内债务，这使得它们容易受到本国主权违约风险的影响。同时，当银行业陷入困境时，政府往往采取代价高昂的救助措施。我们研究了网络结构以及银行业内主权债务所有权分布如何共同影响这种“厄运循环”下的最优救助政策。我们认为，如果持有高国内主权风险敞口的银行在金融网络中具有足够中心性，那么救助这些银行是最优的，尽管这需要比救助其他条件相同但低风险敞口的银行更大的救助支出。我们的模型说明了“厄运循环”如何加剧“过于互联而不能倒”的问题。

27073.title: Religion, Education, and the State
27073.authors: Samuel Bazzi, Masyhur Hilmy, Benjamin Marx
27073.abstract: This paper explores how state and religious providers of education compete during the nation building process. Using novel administrative data, we characterize the evolution of Indonesia’s Islamic education system and religious school choice after the introduction of mass public primary schooling in the 1970s. Funded through informal taxation, Islamic schools competed with the state by entering in the same markets. While primary enrollment shifted towards state schools, religious education increased overall as Islamic schools absorbed growing demand for secondary education. In the short run, electoral support for the secular regime weakened in markets with greater public school construction. Over the long run, Islamic schools established at this juncture are more differentiated in terms of religious curriculum, and cohorts exposed to mass public schooling as children are more invested in religion than in the national identity. Our findings offer a new perspective on the political economy of education reforms and the emergence of parallel systems of public goods provision.
27073.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了在国家建设过程中，国家与宗教教育提供者如何竞争。利用新颖的行政数据，我们描述了20世纪70年代大规模公立小学教育引入后，印度尼西亚伊斯兰教育体系和宗教学校选择的演变。通过非正式税收资助，伊斯兰学校通过进入相同市场与国家竞争。虽然小学入学率转向公立学校，但宗教教育总体增加，因为伊斯兰学校吸收了日益增长的中学教育需求。短期内，在公立学校建设更多的市场中，对世俗政权的选举支持减弱。长期来看，在这一时期建立的伊斯兰学校在宗教课程方面更加差异化，而童年时期接触大规模公立教育的群体在宗教方面的投入多于国家认同。我们的发现为教育改革的政治经济学以及公共物品提供平行体系的出现提供了新视角。
27073.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, ED, LS, PE, POL；JEL：H52, I25, N45, P16, Z12

27072.title: Geographic Mobility in America: Evidence from Cell Phone Data
27072.zh_title: 美国的地理流动性：来自手机数据的证据
27072.authors: M. Keith Chen, Devin G. Pope
27072.abstract: Traveling beyond the immediate surroundings of one’s residence can lead to greater exposure to new ideas and information, jobs, and greater transmission of disease. In this paper, we document the geographic mobility of individuals in the U.S., and how this mobility varies across U.S. cities, regions, and income classes. Using geolocation data for ~1.7 million smartphone users over a 10-month period, we compute different measures of mobility, including the total distance traveled, the median daily distance traveled, the maximum distance traveled from one’s home, and the number of unique haunts visited. We find large differences across cities and income groups. For example, people in New York travel 38% fewer total kilometers and visit 14% fewer block-sized areas than people in Atlanta. And, individuals in the bottom income quartile travel 12% less overall and visit 13% fewer total locations than the top income quartile.
27072.zh_abstract: 出行超出个人住所的周边范围，可以带来更多接触新思想、信息和工作的机会，但也增加了疾病传播的风险。在本文中，我们记录了美国个人的地理流动性，以及这种流动性如何在美国城市、地区和收入阶层之间变化。利用约170万智能手机用户在10个月内的地理定位数据，我们计算了不同的流动性指标，包括总出行距离、每日中位出行距离、离家最远出行距离以及访问的独特地点数量。我们发现城市和收入群体之间存在巨大差异。例如，纽约人比亚特兰大人总出行距离少38%，访问的街区规模区域少14%。此外，收入最低四分位的人比收入最高四分位的人总出行距离少12%，访问的总地点数量少13%。

27071.title: Team Players: How Social Skills Improve Group Performance
27071.zh_title: 团队合作者：社交技能如何提升团队绩效
27071.abstract: Most jobs require teamwork. Are some people good team players? In this paper we design and test a new method for identifying individual contributions to group performance. We randomly assign people to multiple teams and predict team performance based on previously assessed individual skills. Some people consistently cause their group to exceed its predicted performance. We call these individuals “team players”. Team players score significantly higher on a well-established measure of social intelligence, but do not differ across a variety of other dimensions, including IQ, personality, education and gender. Social skills – defined as a single latent factor that combines social intelligence scores with the team player effect – improve group performance about as much as IQ. We find suggestive evidence that team players increase effort among teammates.
27071.zh_abstract: 大多数工作需要团队合作。有些人是否是优秀的团队合作者？在本文中，我们设计并测试了一种识别个人对团队绩效贡献的新方法。我们将人员随机分配到多个团队，并根据先前评估的个人技能预测团队绩效。有些人始终使其团队超越预测绩效。我们称这些人为“团队合作者”。团队合作者在成熟的社交智力测量中得分显著更高，但在包括智商、人格、教育和性别在内的其他多种维度上没有差异。社交技能——定义为结合社交智力得分与团队合作者效应的单一潜在因素——对团队绩效的提升程度与智商相当。我们发现有提示性证据表明，团队合作者能提高队友的努力程度。

27070.title: Does Economics Make You Sexist?
27070.zh_title: 经济学是否让人变得性别歧视？
27070.authors: Valentina A. Paredes, M. Daniele Paserman, Francisco Pino
27070.abstract: Recent research has highlighted unequal treatment for women in academic economics along several different dimensions, including promotion, hiring, credit for co-authorship, and standards for publication in professional journals. Can the source of these differences lie in biases against women that are pervasive in the discipline, even among students in the earliest stages of their training? In this paper, we provide evidence on the importance of explicit and implicit biases against women among students in economics relative to other fields. We conducted a large scale survey among undergraduate students in Chilean universities, among both entering first-year students and students in years 2 and above. On a wide battery of measures, economics students are more biased than students in other fields. Economics students are somewhat more biased already upon entry, before exposure to any economics classes. The gap is more pronounced among students in years 2 and above, in particular for male students. We also find an increase in bias in a sample of students that we follow longitudinally. Differences in political ideology explain essentially all the gap at entry, but none of the increase in the gap with exposure. Exposure to female students and faculty attenuates some of the bias.
27070.zh_abstract: 近期研究强调了学术经济学界在多个不同维度上对女性的不平等对待，包括晋升、招聘、合著署名以及专业期刊发表标准。这些差异的根源是否在于该学科中普遍存在的对女性的偏见，甚至存在于处于培训早期阶段的学生中？在本文中，我们提供了经济学学生相对于其他领域学生中显性和隐性性别偏见重要性的证据。我们在智利大学本科生中进行了一项大规模调查，对象包括刚入学的一年级学生以及二年级及以上的学生。在一系列广泛的测量指标上，经济学学生比其他领域的学生偏见更强。经济学学生在入学时，即在接触任何经济学课程之前，就已经表现出稍强的偏见。这种差距在二年级及以上的学生中更为明显，尤其是男性学生。我们还在一个纵向跟踪的学生样本中发现了偏见的增加。政治意识形态的差异基本上解释了入学时的全部差距，但无法解释随着课程接触而增加的差距。接触女学生和女教师会减弱部分偏见。

27069.title: Inequality and the Safety Net Throughout the Income Distribution, 1929-1940
27069.zh_title: 1929-1940年收入分配中的不平等与安全网
27069.authors: James J. Feigenbaum, Price V. Fishback, Keoka Grayson
27069.abstract: We explored two measures of inequality that described the full income distribution in cities. One measure is an income gini based on family incomes in 1929 for 33 cities and in 1933 for up to 48 cities in 1933 were spread throughout the country. We also estimated gini coefficients that made use of contract rents for renters and implicit rents for home owners for up to 955 cities throughout the country. We were able to expand to all counties when looking at a top-end inequality measure, the number of taxpayers per family. All three measures varied substantially across the country. We show the correlations between the various measures and also estimate the relationship between the measures and various relief programs developed by governments at all levels during the period.
27069.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了两种描述城市完整收入分配的不平等指标。一种指标是基于1929年33个城市和1933年最多48个城市的家庭收入计算出的收入基尼系数，这些城市分布在全国各地。我们还利用最多955个城市中租房者的合同租金和房主的隐含租金估算了基尼系数。在考察一项顶端不平等指标（即每家庭纳税人数量）时，我们能够将范围扩大到所有县。所有三项指标在全国各地差异显著。我们展示了各指标之间的相关性，并估计了这些指标与这一时期各级政府制定的各种救济计划之间的关系。
